ToSNR-Trans

杨硕

2025-11-10

############################
### Step0:数据预处理-tha ###
############################

library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# 提取指定列
load("/Users/post/Downloads/tha_bmic.RData")

tha_selected <- tha[, c("GDM", "ghb", "Age", "Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", 
                        "BMI", "HB", "FF", "MCV", "MCH")]

# 去除 NA 样本
tha_selected <- na.omit(tha_selected)

# 转换变量类型
tha_selected$Age <- as.numeric(tha_selected$Age)
tha_selected$GDM <- as.numeric(tha_selected$GDM)

tha_selected$Ethnicity <- as.factor(tha_selected$Ethnicity)
tha_selected$IVF <- as.factor(tha_selected$IVF)
tha_selected$Parity <- as.factor(tha_selected$Parity)
tha_selected$BMI <- as.factor(tha_selected$BMI)

# 保存为新数据集
tha_cleaned <- tha_selected

# 要处理的变量
vars_to_scale <- c("ghb", "Age", "HB", "FF", "MCV", "MCH")

# 筛选 Age <= 38
tha_cleaned_trun <- tha_cleaned %>%
  filter(Age <= 38)

# 定义一个帮助函数：对向量 scale() 后把 attr 复制回结果向量
preserve_scale <- function(x) {
  sx <- scale(x)            # 返回带 attr 的 matrix (n x 1)
  out <- as.vector(sx)      # 转成向量（会丢掉 matrix 的属性）
  # 把 scale() 的属性显式赋回单列向量
  attr(out, "scaled:center") <- attr(sx, "scaled:center")
  attr(out, "scaled:scale")  <- attr(sx, "scaled:scale")
  out
}

# 对选定的每一列应用 preserve_scale，并回写到数据框
tha_scaled_trun <- tha_cleaned_trun
tha_scaled_trun[vars_to_scale] <- lapply(tha_scaled_trun[vars_to_scale], preserve_scale)

tha_scaled <- tha_cleaned
tha_scaled[vars_to_scale] <- lapply(tha_scaled[vars_to_scale], preserve_scale)

tha_selected$Ethnicity = ifelse(tha_selected$Ethnicity %in% c(2), 1, 0)
tha_cleaned$Ethnicity = ifelse(tha_cleaned$Ethnicity %in% c(2), 1, 0)
tha_scaled$Ethnicity = ifelse(tha_scaled$Ethnicity %in% c(2), 1, 0)

tha_cleaned_trun$Ethnicity = ifelse(tha_cleaned_trun$Ethnicity %in% c(2), 1, 0)
tha_scaled_trun$Ethnicity = ifelse(tha_scaled_trun$Ethnicity %in% c(2), 1, 0)
#############################
### Step0:数据预处理-norm ###
#############################

load("/Users/post/Downloads/norm_new.RData")

columns_to_denormalize <- c("Age", "HB", "MCH", "MCV", "FF", "ghb")
norm_init <- norm
for (col_name in columns_to_denormalize) {
  
  # 提取该列的 center (均值 mu) 和 scale (标准差 sigma) 属性
  # 假设这些属性是在对原始数据进行 scale() 操作后保留在 norm 数据框的列属性中
  
  mu <- attr(norm[[col_name]], "scaled:center")
  sigma <- attr(norm[[col_name]], "scaled:scale")
  
  # 执行反标准化操作： X = Z * sigma + mu
  norm_init[[col_name]] <- (norm_init[[col_name]] * sigma) + mu
}
########################
### Step0:数据预处理 ###
########################

# 统一基准水平的函数
set_reference_level <- function(data_frame, var_name, ref_level) {
  var_col <- data_frame[[var_name]]
  
  # 确保它是因子
  if (!is.factor(var_col)) {
    var_col <- factor(var_col)
  }
  
  # 重新设置因子的水平顺序，将基准水平放在第一位
  current_levels <- levels(var_col)
  
  # 检查基准水平是否存在
  if (!(ref_level %in% current_levels)) {
    warning(paste("Reference level", ref_level, "not found in", var_name, "levels."))
    return(data_frame)
  }
  
  # 将 ref_level 移到列表的开头
  new_levels <- c(ref_level, setdiff(current_levels, ref_level))
  
  # 应用新的水平顺序
  data_frame[[var_name]] <- factor(var_col, levels = new_levels)
  return(data_frame)
}

# 对目标域和源域应用修改
tha_scaled_trun <- set_reference_level(tha_scaled_trun, "BMI", "1")
norm <- set_reference_level(norm, "BMI", "1")

tha_scaled_trun <- set_reference_level(tha_scaled_trun, "Ethnicity", "0")
norm <- set_reference_level(norm, "Ethnicity", "0")

tha_scaled_trun <- set_reference_level(tha_scaled_trun, "IVF", "0")
norm <- set_reference_level(norm, "IVF", "0")

tha_scaled_trun <- set_reference_level(tha_scaled_trun, "Parity", "0")
norm <- set_reference_level(norm, "Parity", "0")
########################
### Step1:描述性分析 ###
########################

proportion_gdm_tha <- sum(tha_scaled_trun$GDM == 1, na.rm = TRUE) / nrow(tha_scaled_trun)
cat("tha样本GDM=1 样本占比: ", round(proportion_gdm_tha * 100, 2), "%\n")
## tha样本GDM=1 样本占比:  29.52 %
proportion_gdm_norm <- sum(norm$GDM == 1, na.rm = TRUE) / nrow(norm)
cat("norm样本GDM=1 样本占比: ", round(proportion_gdm_norm * 100, 2), "%\n")
## norm样本GDM=1 样本占比:  26.14 %
chi_sq_result <- prop.test(x = c(sum(tha_scaled_trun$GDM == 1, na.rm = TRUE), sum(norm$GDM == 1, na.rm = TRUE)), n = c(nrow(tha_scaled_trun), nrow(norm)))
print(chi_sq_result$p.value)
## [1] 0.1276885
numeric_vars <- c("ghb", "Age", "HB", "FF", "MCV", "MCH")
factor_vars <- c("Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI")
# --- 1. 处理 tha_cleaned_trun 数据集 ---
cat("==========================================\n")
## ==========================================
cat("      tha_cleaned_trun 数据集统计        \n")
##       tha_cleaned_trun 数据集统计
cat("==========================================\n")
## ==========================================
## 数值型变量：均值和方差
cat("\n--- 数值型变量 (均值和方差) ---\n")
## 
## --- 数值型变量 (均值和方差) ---
tha_numeric_stats <- sapply(tha_cleaned_trun[numeric_vars], function(x) {
  c(Mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), SE = sqrt(var(x, na.rm = TRUE)))
})
print(tha_numeric_stats)
##            ghb       Age        HB       FF       MCV       MCH
## Mean 5.4180723 29.997992 108.81430 38.07247 77.232403 24.308677
## SE   0.4044331  3.826992  10.18207 34.98463  7.490028  2.813297
## 分类变量：因子比例
cat("\n--- 分类变量 (各因子比例) ---\n")
## 
## --- 分类变量 (各因子比例) ---
for (var in factor_vars) {
  if (var %in% names(tha_cleaned_trun)) {
    cat("\n[", var, "]\n")
    # 使用 table 计数，prop.table 计算比例
    tha_factor_prop <- prop.table(table(tha_cleaned_trun[[var]], useNA = "ifany"))
    print(tha_factor_prop)
  }
}

cat("==========================================\n")
## ==========================================
## 数值型变量：均值和方差
cat("\n--- 数值型变量 (均值和方差) ---\n")

norm_numeric_stats <- sapply(norm_init[numeric_vars], function(x) {
  c(Mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), SE = sqrt(var(x, na.rm = TRUE)))
})
print(norm_numeric_stats)

cat("\n--- 分类变量 (各因子比例) ---\n")

for (var in factor_vars) {
  if (var %in% names(norm_init)) {
    cat("\n[", var, "]\n")
    # 使用 table 计数，prop.table 计算比例
    norm_factor_prop <- prop.table(table(norm_init[[var]], useNA = "ifany"))

}

########################
### Step2:卡方/t检验 ###
########################

# 连续变量（t检验）
cont_vars <- c("ghb", "Age", "HB", "FF", "MCV", "MCH")

cat("==== 连续变量 t 检验 ====\n")
## ==== 连续变量 t 检验 ====
for (v in cont_vars) {
  # 提取两组向量（去掉 NA）
  x1 <- na.omit(tha_cleaned_trun[[v]])
  x2 <- na.omit(norm_init[[v]])
  
  # 独立样本 t 检验（不假设方差相等）
  t_res <- t.test(x1, x2, var.equal = FALSE)
  
  cat("\n变量:", v, "\n")
  cat("  t =", round(t_res$statistic, 3),
      " df =", round(t_res$parameter, 1),
      " p =", signif(t_res$p.value, 3), "\n")
  if (t_res$p.value < 0.05) cat("  → 差异显著\n")
  else cat("  → 无显著差异\n")
}
## 
## 变量: ghb 
##   t = 10.287  df = 629.3  p = 4.76e-23 
##   → 差异显著
## 
## 变量: Age 
##   t = -1.613  df = 721.7  p = 0.107 
##   → 无显著差异
## 
## 变量: HB 
##   t = -26.968  df = 645.7  p = 7.25e-108 
##   → 差异显著
## 
## 变量: FF 
##   t = -13.563  df = 665.3  p = 3.55e-37 
##   → 差异显著
## 
## 变量: MCV 
##   t = -30.769  df = 591.3  p = 7.5e-125 
##   → 差异显著
## 
## 变量: MCH 
##   t = -38.41  df = 611.3  p = 4.15e-165 
##   → 差异显著
# 分类变量（卡方检验）
cat_vars <- c("Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI")

cat("\n==== 分类变量 卡方检验 ====\n")
## 
## ==== 分类变量 卡方检验 ====
for (v in cat_vars) {
  # 构造列联表
  tab <- table(
    group = c(rep("tha_cleaned_trun", nrow(tha_cleaned_trun)),
              rep("norm_init", nrow(norm_init))),
    var = c(as.character(tha_cleaned_trun[[v]]),
            as.character(norm_init[[v]]))
  )
  
  # 卡方检验（自动修正）
  chi_res <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab))
  
  cat("\n变量:", v, "\n")
  cat("  卡方值 =", round(chi_res$statistic, 3),
      " df =", chi_res$parameter,
      " p =", signif(chi_res$p.value, 3), "\n")
  if (chi_res$p.value < 0.05) cat("  → 差异显著\n")
  else cat("  → 无显著差异\n")
}
## 
## 变量: Ethnicity 
##   卡方值 = 372.093  df = 1  p = 6.55e-83 
##   → 差异显著
## 
## 变量: IVF 
##   卡方值 = 0.401  df = 1  p = 0.527 
##   → 无显著差异
## 
## 变量: Parity 
##   卡方值 = 1.227  df = 1  p = 0.268 
##   → 无显著差异
## 
## 变量: BMI 
##   卡方值 = 1.733  df = 3  p = 0.63 
##   → 无显著差异
###########################
### Step3:无阈值GLM建模 ###
###########################

model_formula <- GDM ~ .

# 拟合模型
logistic_model_norm <- glm(
  formula = model_formula,
  data = norm,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 输出拟合结果（包括系数、标准误差、p 值、AIC等）
print("--- norm 数据框的 Logistic 模型拟合结果 ---")
## [1] "--- norm 数据框的 Logistic 模型拟合结果 ---"
summary(logistic_model_norm)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = model_formula, family = binomial(link = "logit"), 
##     data = norm)
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -1.36001    0.13741  -9.897  < 2e-16 ***

## IVF1        -0.11097    0.28944  -0.383 0.701423

## Residual deviance: 3210.9  on 2948  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 3236.9
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
# 拟合模型
logistic_model_tha <- glm(
  formula = model_formula,
  data = tha_scaled_trun,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 输出拟合结果
print("--- tha_scaled_trun 数据框的 Logistic 模型拟合结果 ---")
## [1] "--- tha_scaled_trun 数据框的 Logistic 模型拟合结果 ---"
summary(logistic_model_tha)

## Ethnicity1   0.37849    0.22162   1.708 0.087669 .  
## IVF1         0.73291    0.78417   0.935 0.349978

## BMI2         0.28092    0.32001   0.878 0.380034    
## BMI3         0.99251    0.44646   2.223 0.026211 *  
## BMI4         0.47528    0.61598   0.772 0.440363

## MCV         -0.13824    0.63385  -0.218 0.827349    
## MCH         -0.09002    0.65977  -0.136 0.891470    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 604.30  on 497  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 551.34  on 485  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 577.34
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
######################################
### Step4:阈值效应检验及To-SNR优化 ###
######################################

# score-style 检验是否存在阈值效应（基于 phi_mean）
score_test_for_threshold <- function(var_vec, Y, fitted_model, M = 10) {
  mu1 <- predict(fitted_model, type = "response")
  mu0 <- mu1 * (1 - mu1)
  n <- length(Y)
  X.matrix <- model.matrix(fitted_model)         # 设计矩阵 (n x p)
  # candidate taus: quantiles
  phi_value <- as.numeric(quantile(var_vec, probs = (1:M) / (M + 1), na.rm = TRUE))
  # phi_function return n-vector
  phi_function <- function(tau) as.numeric(var_vec > tau) * (var_vec - tau)
  aa <- sapply(phi_value, phi_function)
  phi_mean <- matrix(rowMeans(aa), ncol = 1)
  D <- diag(as.vector(mu0))
  l0 <- as.numeric(t(phi_mean) %*% (Y - mu1))
  # V1 calculation (as in你的代码)
  V1 <- t(phi_mean) %*% D %*% X.matrix %*% solve(t(X.matrix) %*% D %*% X.matrix) %*% t(X.matrix) %*% D %*% phi_mean
  var_l0 <- as.numeric(t(phi_mean) %*% D %*% phi_mean - V1)
  # 防护
  if (is.na(var_l0) || var_l0 <= 0) {
    return(list(s0 = NA, p.value = NA))
  }
  s0 <- as.numeric(l0 / sqrt(var_l0))
  p.value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(s0)))
  return(list(s0 = s0, p.value = p.value, phi_mean = phi_mean, phi_value = phi_value))
}

# score-style 检验是否存在阈值效应（基于特定phi）
score_test_for_threshold_simp <- function(var_vec, Y, fitted_model, tau) {
  mu1 <- predict(fitted_model, type = "response")     # 拟合概率
  mu0 <- mu1 * (1 - mu1)
  X.matrix <- model.matrix(fitted_model)
  D <- diag(as.vector(mu0))
  
  # 定义 phi 函数
  phi_function <- function(tau_value) as.numeric(var_vec > tau_value) * (var_vec - tau_value)
  
  # 对每个 tau 单独计算统计量
  results <- lapply(tau, function(tau_value) {
    phi_vec <- matrix(phi_function(tau_value), ncol = 1)
    l0 <- as.numeric(t(phi_vec) %*% (Y - mu1))
    V1 <- t(phi_vec) %*% D %*% X.matrix %*%
      solve(t(X.matrix) %*% D %*% X.matrix) %*%
      t(X.matrix) %*% D %*% phi_vec
    var_l0 <- as.numeric(t(phi_vec) %*% D %*% phi_vec - V1)
    
    if (is.na(var_l0) || var_l0 <= 0) {
      s0 <- NA
      p.value <- NA
    } else {
      s0 <- as.numeric(l0 / sqrt(var_l0))
      p.value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(s0)))
    }
    
    data.frame(tau = tau_value, s0 = s0, p.value = p.value)
  })
  
  # 合并为表格输出
  results_df <- do.call(rbind, results)
  rownames(results_df) <- NULL
  
  return(results_df)
}

# 在给定当前模型和数据上，用网格搜索估计最佳 tau（以 AIC 最小化为准）
estimate_tau_by_grid <- function(var_vec, dat_full, base_formula, grid_tau = NULL, ngrid = 100) {
  # base_formula: character or formula for current model WITHOUT the new phi term,
  #              e.g. "Y ~ X + Ethnicity + BMI + ..."
  if (is.null(grid_tau)) {
    grid_tau <- seq(min(var_vec, na.rm = TRUE), max(var_vec, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = ngrid)
  }
  best_tau <- NA
  best_aic <- Inf
  for (tau in grid_tau) {
    phi_col <- as.numeric(var_vec > tau) * (var_vec - tau)
    dat_tmp <- dat_full
    dat_tmp$phi_tmp <- phi_col
    # fit glm quickly
    fm <- try(glm(as.formula(paste(base_formula, "+ phi_tmp")), family = binomial, data = dat_tmp), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(fm, "try-error")) next
    aic_val <- AIC(fm)
    if (!is.na(aic_val) && aic_val < best_aic) {
      best_aic <- aic_val
      best_tau <- tau
    }
  }
  return(list(best_tau = best_tau, best_aic = best_aic))
}

# 计算 AUC 辅助
calc_auc <- function(model, data) {
  preds <- predict(model, newdata = data, type = "response")
  roc_obj <- roc(data$Y, preds, quiet = TRUE)
  return(list(auc = as.numeric(auc(roc_obj)), roc = roc_obj))
}

ToSNR_logistic_1dim <- function(tau0) {
  #' tau0: 初始阈值，命名向量，如 c(ghb = -0.797)
  
  erro <- FALSE
  eta <- tau0 * 0 + 1   # 初始化 eta 向量
  j <- 1
  
  # 假设全局变量已经存在：Y, X, Z
  # X: 单阈值变量，向量或单列 data.frame
  # Z: 协变量，data.frame，可为空
  
  while (max(abs(eta)) > 1e-7 & j <= 100 & !erro) {
    tau_prev <- tau0
    
    # 构造超额变量
    X_tau <- as.numeric(X > tau0) * (X - tau0)
    
    # 构造数据框用于 GLM
    glm_data <- data.frame(
      Y = Y,
      X = X,
      X_tau = X_tau,
      Z
    )
    
    # 拟合 GLM
    formula <- as.formula(paste("Y ~ X + X_tau", if (ncol(Z) > 0) paste("+", paste(colnames(Z), collapse = " + ")) else ""))
    
    glm_fit <- tryCatch(
      glm(formula, family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25)),
      error = function(e) { erro <<- TRUE; return(NULL) }
    )
    
    if (erro) break
    
    mu0 <- predict(glm_fit, type = "response")
    
    # 计算 eta
    I_tau <- as.numeric(X > tau0)
    delta <- coef(glm_fit)["X_tau"]
    
    Un <- -mean((Y - mu0) * I_tau)
    Jn <- delta * mean(mu0 * (1 - mu0) * I_tau)
    
    eta <- tryCatch({ Un / Jn }, error = function(e) { erro <<- TRUE; return(0) })
    
    if (erro | is.na(eta)) eta <- 0
    
    # 更新 tau
    tau0 <- tau0 + eta
    j <- j + 1
  }
  
  tau_out <- if (!erro & !is.na(eta)) tau0 else NA
  
  return(list(tau = tau_out, iter = j - 1, converged = !erro))
}
##########################################
### Step4:阈值效应检验及To-SNR优化-tha ###
##########################################

# =================== 阈值检测（ghb，使用tha_scaled_trun数据） ===================

alpha_level <- 0.1

best_tau_ghb_tha_trun <- NA
# best_tau_age_tha <- NA
pval_ghb_trun <- NA
# pval_age <- NA

# 初始模型公式（无阈值项）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb"

# 1️⃣ 拟合基础模型
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = tha_scaled_trun)

# 2️⃣ 检测 ghb 阈值效应
st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = tha_scaled_trun$ghb,
  Y = tha_scaled_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb_trun <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb_trun, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.04335
# 若显著，估计 tau 并加入模型
if (!is.na(pval_ghb_trun) && pval_ghb_trun < alpha_level) {
  est_ghb <- estimate_tau_by_grid(
    var_vec = tha_scaled_trun$ghb,
    dat_full = tha_scaled_trun,
    base_formula = initial_formula,
    ngrid = 100
  )
  best_tau_ghb_tha_trun <- est_ghb$best_tau
  
  # ---- 结果汇总 ----
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("ghb 阈值效应: p = %s (显著)\n", formatC(pval_ghb_trun, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_tha_trun))
  
} else {
  # 若不显著，也输出默认建议
  best_tau_ghb_tha_trun <- median(tha_scaled_trun$ghb, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("ghb 阈值效应: p = %s (不显著)\n", formatC(pval_ghb_trun, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 中位数) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_tha_trun))
}
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## ---- 阈值检测总结 ----
## 显著性水平 α = 0.1 
## 
## ghb 阈值效应: p = 0.0433 (显著)
## 推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = -0.7465
cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用tha_scaled_trun数据）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用tha_scaled_trun数据）===============
tryCatch({
  
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(ghb = best_tau_ghb_tha_trun)  # 单阈值初始值
  
  # 🔹全局变量供 ToSNR_logistic 使用
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- tha_scaled_trun$GDM
  X <- tha_scaled_trun$ghb
  Z_vars <- c("Age","Ethnicity","IVF","Parity","BMI","HB","MCH","MCV","FF")
  Z <- tha_scaled_trun[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_ghb <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_ghb_tha_trun <- tau_ghb
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 Age_phi ----
  tha_scaled_trun$ghb_phi <- as.numeric(tha_scaled_trun$ghb > tau_ghb) * (tha_scaled_trun$ghb - tau_ghb)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, ghb = X, ghb_phi = tha_scaled_trun$ghb_phi, Z)
  glm_final_tha <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_tha))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_tha, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_tha_ghb_trun <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_ghb),
    Threshold = tau_ghb
  )
  print(tau_df_tha_ghb_trun)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（ghb）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -1.896609   0.434989  -4.360  1.3e-05 ***
## ghb         -0.380580   0.278883  -1.365 0.172361    
## ghb_phi      0.830165   0.362948   2.287 0.022179 *  
## Age          0.306800   0.116623   2.631 0.008521 ** 
## Ethnicity1   0.368399   0.222938   1.652 0.098437 .  
## IVF1         0.573889   0.780696   0.735 0.462279    
## Parity1     -0.530010   0.231343  -2.291 0.021963 *  
## BMI2         0.256372   0.321032   0.799 0.424531    
## BMI3         0.925412   0.449567   2.058 0.039547 *  
## BMI4         0.314349   0.627620   0.501 0.616471    
## HB           0.515922   0.143896   3.585 0.000337 ***
## MCH         -0.003029   0.661633  -0.005 0.996347    
## MCV         -0.229124   0.634633  -0.361 0.718074    
## FF          -0.259725   0.139249  -1.865 0.062155 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 604.30  on 497  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 546.21  on 484  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 574.21
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = 0.6987
##     Variable  Threshold
## ghb      ghb -0.7181756
# =================== 阈值检测（ghb2，使用tha_scaled_trun数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = tha_scaled_trun)

st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = tha_scaled_trun$ghb,
  Y = tha_scaled_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb_trun <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb_trun, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.8538
# =================== 阈值检测（Age，使用tha_scaled_trun数据） ===================

# ---- 检测 Age 阈值效应 ----
st_age_simp <- score_test_for_threshold_simp(
  var_vec = tha_scaled_trun$Age,
  Y = tha_scaled_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  tau = c(1.095)
)
pval_Age_trun <- st_age_simp$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_Age_trun, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.09926
best_tau_age_tha <- 1.095

cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age，使用tha_scaled_trun数据）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age，使用tha_scaled_trun数据）===============
tryCatch({
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(Age = 1.095)
  
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- tha_scaled_trun$GDM
  X <- tha_scaled_trun$Age
  Z_vars <- c("ghb", "ghb_phi", "Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI", "HB", "MCH", "MCV", "FF")
  Z <- tha_scaled_trun[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_age <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_age_tha <- tau_age
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 Age_phi ----
  tha_scaled_trun$Age_phi <- as.numeric(tha_scaled_trun$Age > tau_age) * (tha_scaled_trun$Age - tau_age)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, Age = X, Age_phi = tha_scaled_trun$Age_phi, Z)
  glm_final_tha <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_tha))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_tha, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_tha_Age_trun <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_age),
    Threshold = tau_age
  )
  print(tau_df_tha_Age_trun)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（Age）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -1.992992   0.441743  -4.512 6.43e-06 ***
## Age          0.163853   0.144058   1.137 0.255369    
## Age_phi      0.985637   0.601567   1.638 0.101328    
## ghb         -0.383914   0.279775  -1.372 0.169994    
## ghb_phi      0.854540   0.364534   2.344 0.019068 *  
## Ethnicity1   0.382448   0.223886   1.708 0.087594 .  
## IVF1         0.423615   0.803116   0.527 0.597871    
## Parity1     -0.540553   0.233295  -2.317 0.020502 *  
## BMI2         0.263169   0.321009   0.820 0.412320    
## BMI3         0.909998   0.450312   2.021 0.043299 *  
## BMI4         0.284426   0.633183   0.449 0.653287    
## HB           0.524353   0.144583   3.627 0.000287 ***
## MCH          0.006362   0.664812   0.010 0.992365    
## MCV         -0.233326   0.637452  -0.366 0.714343    
## FF          -0.259263   0.140236  -1.849 0.064492 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 604.30  on 497  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 543.53  on 483  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 573.53
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = 0.7048
##     Variable Threshold
## Age      Age  1.095355
# =================== 阈值检测（Age2，使用tha_scaled_trun数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi + Age_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = tha_scaled_trun)

st_age <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = tha_scaled_trun$Age,
  Y = tha_scaled_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_Age_trun <- st_age$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_Age_trun, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.9027
###########################################
### Step4:阈值效应检验及To-SNR优化-norm ###
###########################################

# =================== 阈值检测（ghb，使用norm数据） ===================

alpha_level <- 0.1

best_tau_ghb_norm <- NA
# best_tau_age_norm <- NA
pval_ghb <- NA
# pval_age <- NA

# 初始模型公式（无阈值项）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb"

# 1️⃣ 拟合基础模型
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm)

# 2️⃣ 检测 ghb 阈值效应
st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm$ghb,
  Y = norm$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.00186
# 若显著，估计 tau 并加入模型
if (!is.na(pval_ghb) && pval_ghb < alpha_level) {
  est_ghb <- estimate_tau_by_grid(
    var_vec = norm$ghb,
    dat_full = norm,
    base_formula = initial_formula,
    ngrid = 100
  )
  best_tau_ghb_norm <- est_ghb$best_tau
  
  # ---- 结果汇总 ----
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("ghb 阈值效应: p = %s (显著)\n", formatC(pval_ghb, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_norm))
  
} else {
  # 若不显著，也输出默认建议
  best_tau_ghb_norm <- median(tha_scaled$ghb, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("Age 阈值效应: p = %s (不显著)\n", formatC(pval_age, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 中位数) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_norm))
}
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## ---- 阈值检测总结 ----
## 显著性水平 α = 0.1 
## 
## ghb 阈值效应: p = 0.0019 (显著)
## 推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = -1.2613
cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用norm数据）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用norm数据）===============
tryCatch({
  
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(ghb = best_tau_ghb_norm)  # 单阈值初始值
  
  # 🔹全局变量供 ToSNR_logistic 使用
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- norm$GDM
  X <- norm$ghb
  Z_vars <- c("Age","Ethnicity","IVF","Parity","BMI","HB","MCH","MCV","FF")
  Z <- norm[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_ghb <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_ghb_norm <- tau_ghb
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 ghb_phi ----
  norm$ghb_phi <- as.numeric(norm$ghb > tau_ghb) * (norm$ghb - tau_ghb)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, ghb = X, ghb_phi = norm$ghb_phi, Z)
  glm_final_norm <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_norm))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_norm, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_norm_ghb <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_ghb),
    Threshold = tau_ghb
  )
  print(tau_df_norm_ghb)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（ghb）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -2.336815   0.253018  -9.236  < 2e-16 ***
## ghb         -0.288368   0.137504  -2.097  0.03598 *  
## ghb_phi      0.765051   0.164962   4.638 3.52e-06 ***
## Age          0.299714   0.048121   6.228 4.71e-10 ***
## Ethnicity1  -0.007022   0.186686  -0.038  0.97000    
## IVF1        -0.086501   0.291012  -0.297  0.76628    
## Parity1     -0.221506   0.094968  -2.332  0.01968 *  
## BMI2         0.329794   0.141703   2.327  0.01995 *  
## BMI3         0.602606   0.190735   3.159  0.00158 ** 
## BMI4         0.712483   0.251739   2.830  0.00465 ** 
## HB           0.303067   0.049405   6.134 8.55e-10 ***
## MCH         -0.263275   0.125147  -2.104  0.03540 *  
## MCV          0.202828   0.117297   1.729  0.08378 .  
## FF           0.009340   0.043925   0.213  0.83161    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 3402.3  on 2960  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 3193.0  on 2947  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 3221
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = 0.6716
##     Variable Threshold
## ghb      ghb -1.232962
# =================== 阈值检测（ghb2，使用norm数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm)

st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm$ghb,
  Y = norm$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.8275
# =================== 阈值检测（Age，使用 norm 数据） ===================

alpha_level <- 0.1

# best_tau_ghb_norm <- NA   # 保留原变量名（方便后续兼容）
best_tau_age_norm <- NA
# pval_ghb <- NA
pval_age <- NA

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm)

# ---- 检测 Age 阈值效应 ----
st_age <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm$Age,
  Y = norm$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_age <- st_age$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_age, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.02537
# 若显著，则估计 tau 并更新模型
if (!is.na(pval_age) && pval_age < alpha_level) {
  est_age <- estimate_tau_by_grid(
    var_vec = norm$Age,
    dat_full = norm,
    base_formula = initial_formula,
    ngrid = 100
  )
  best_tau_age_norm <- est_age$best_tau
  
  # ---- 结果汇总 ----
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("Age 阈值效应: p = %s (显著)\n", formatC(pval_age, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_age_norm))
  
} else {
  # 若不显著，也输出默认建议
  best_tau_age_norm <- median(norm$Age, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("Age 阈值效应: p = %s (不显著)\n", formatC(pval_age, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_age_norm))
}
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## ---- 阈值检测总结 ----
## 显著性水平 α = 0.1 
## 
## Age 阈值效应: p = 0.0254 (显著)
## 推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = 3.1762
cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age）===============
tryCatch({
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(Age = 0.164)
  
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- norm$GDM
  X <- norm$Age
  Z_vars <- c("ghb", "ghb_phi", "Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI", "HB", "MCH", "MCV", "FF")
  Z <- norm[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_age <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_age_norm <- tau_age
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 Age_phi ----
  norm$Age_phi <- as.numeric(norm$Age > tau_age) * (norm$Age - tau_age)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, Age = X, Age_phi = norm$Age_phi, Z)
  glm_final_norm <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_norm))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_norm, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_norm_Age <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_age),
    Threshold = tau_age
  )
  print(tau_df_norm_Age)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（Age）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -2.242981   0.256262  -8.753  < 2e-16 ***
## Age          0.465826   0.089763   5.189 2.11e-07 ***
## Age_phi     -0.331128   0.148263  -2.233  0.02552 *  
## ghb         -0.290008   0.137480  -2.109  0.03491 *  
## ghb_phi      0.762850   0.164982   4.624 3.77e-06 ***
## Ethnicity1  -0.004297   0.186831  -0.023  0.98165    
## IVF1        -0.084939   0.289430  -0.293  0.76916    
## Parity1     -0.218062   0.094780  -2.301  0.02141 *  
## BMI2         0.330722   0.141896   2.331  0.01977 *  
## BMI3         0.613897   0.190891   3.216  0.00130 ** 
## BMI4         0.714475   0.251578   2.840  0.00451 ** 
## HB           0.301911   0.049485   6.101 1.05e-09 ***
## MCH         -0.265932   0.125228  -2.124  0.03370 *  
## MCV          0.199366   0.117335   1.699  0.08930 .  
## FF           0.009633   0.044050   0.219  0.82689    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 3402.3  on 2960  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 3188.0  on 2946  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 3218
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = 0.6723
##     Variable Threshold
## Age      Age 0.2060593
# =================== 阈值检测（Age2，使用norm数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi + Age_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm)

st_age <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm$Age,
  Y = norm$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_age <- st_age$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_age, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.7358
##############################
### Step5:构建迁移学习矩阵 ###
##############################

build_H_matrix_2 <- function(data) {
  # ---- 提取数值变量 ----
  ghb <- data$ghb
  Age <- data$Age
  HB <- data$HB
  MCH <- data$MCH
  MCV <- data$MCV
  FF <- data$FF
  ghb_phi <- data$ghb_phi
  Age_phi <- data$Age_phi
  
  n <- nrow(data)
  
  # ---- 分类变量 ----
  cat_vars <- c("Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI")
  Z_cat <- data[, cat_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 统一为 factor
  Z_cat <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z_cat, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 数值协变量矩阵 ----
  Z_num <- data.frame(HB = HB, MCH = MCH, MCV = MCV, FF = FF)
  
  # ---- 关键修改：让 intercept 与行数一致 ----
  # intercept <- rep(1, n)
  
  # ---- 整合设计矩阵 ----
  H <- data.frame(
    # intercept = intercept,
    ghb = ghb,
    ghb_phi = ghb_phi,
    Age = Age,
    Age_phi = Age_phi,
    Z_num,
    Z_cat
  )
  
  # ---- 自动生成哑变量矩阵 ----
  H_mat <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = H)  # 保留 intercept 列
  
  return(H_mat)
}

# 构造矩阵
X_target_2 <- build_H_matrix_2(tha_scaled_trun)
X_source_2 <- build_H_matrix_2(norm)

X_target_2 <- X_target_2[, colnames(X_target_2) != "Ethnicity0"]
X_source_2 <- X_source_2[, colnames(X_source_2) != "Ethnicity0"]

# 响应变量
y_target_2 <- tha_scaled_trun$GDM
y_source_2 <- norm$GDM
################################
### Step6:源数据可迁移性检验 ###
################################

Trans_check_single_source <- function(
    X_target, y_target,
    X_source, y_source,
    C0 = 2,                # 判别阈值系数，可调
    lambda_lasso = 0.0001,  # Lasso 惩罚
    seed = 123
) {
  library(glmnet)
  set.seed(seed)
  
  n <- nrow(X_target)
  folds <- sample(rep(1:3, length.out = n))   # 随机分三折
  
  # --- 容器 ---
  L0_hat_k <- numeric(3)   # 带源
  L0_hat_0 <- numeric(3)   # 仅目标
  
  # --- 三折循环 ---
  for (r in 1:3) {
    idx_val <- which(folds == r)
    idx_train <- setdiff(1:n, idx_val)
    
    X_train <- X_target[idx_train, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y_target[idx_train]
    X_val   <- X_target[idx_val, , drop = FALSE]
    y_val   <- y_target[idx_val]
    
    # (2) 仅目标 Lasso
    fit0 <- glmnet(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      family = "binomial",
      alpha = 1,
      lambda = lambda_lasso,
      standardize = FALSE
    )
    beta0 <- as.matrix(coef(fit0, s = lambda_lasso))
    eta0 <- as.vector(cbind(1, X_val) %*% beta0)
    mu0 <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta0))
    L0_hat_0[r] <- -mean(y_val * log(mu0 + 1e-8) + (1 - y_val) * log(1 - mu0 + 1e-8))
    
    # (3) 目标 + 源 Lasso
    X_train_mix <- rbind(X_train, X_source)
    y_train_mix <- c(y_train, y_source)
    fitk <- glmnet(
      x = X_train_mix,
      y = y_train_mix,
      family = "binomial",
      alpha = 1,
      lambda = lambda_lasso,
      standardize = FALSE
    )
    betak <- as.matrix(coef(fitk, s = lambda_lasso))
    eta1 <- as.vector(cbind(1, X_val) %*% betak)
    mu1 <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta1))
    L0_hat_k[r] <- -mean(y_val * log(mu1 + 1e-8) + (1 - y_val) * log(1 - mu1 + 1e-8))
  }
  
  # (4) 计算整体指标
  L0_k_bar <- mean(L0_hat_k)
  L0_0_bar <- mean(L0_hat_0)
  sigma_hat <- sqrt(sum((L0_hat_k - L0_hat_0)^2) / 2)
  criterion <- C0 * max(sigma_hat, 0.01)
  diff_val <- L0_k_bar - L0_0_bar
  is_good <- (diff_val <= criterion)
  
  # --- 输出 ---
  cat("===== 单源 Trans-GLM 检测结果 =====\n")
  cat("L0_hat^(1) =", round(L0_k_bar, 5), "\n")
  cat("L0_hat^(0) =", round(L0_0_bar, 5), "\n")
  cat("Diff =", round(diff_val, 5), "\n")
  cat("σ̂ =", round(sigma_hat, 5), "\n")
  cat("C0*(σ̂∨0.01) =", round(criterion, 5), "\n")
  cat("可迁移好源?:", ifelse(is_good, "✅ 是", "❌ 否"), "\n")
  
  return(list(
    L0_hat_1 = L0_k_bar,
    L0_hat_0 = L0_0_bar,
    sigma_hat = sigma_hat,
    diff = diff_val,
    criterion = criterion,
    is_good_source = is_good
  ))
}

result2_check <- Trans_check_single_source(
  X_target = X_target_2,
  y_target = y_target_2,
  X_source = X_source_2,
  y_source = y_source_2,
  C0 = 2,
  lambda_lasso = 0.0001
)
## Loading required package: Matrix
## Loaded glmnet 4.1-8
## ===== 单源 Trans-GLM 检测结果 =====
## L0_hat^(1) = 0.57247 
## L0_hat^(0) = 0.58357 
## Diff = -0.0111 
## σ̂ = 0.01484 
## C0*(σ̂∨0.01) = 0.02968 
## 可迁移好源?: ✅ 是
##############################
### Step5:迁移学习得到系数 ###
##############################

A_Trans_logistic <- function(
    X_target, y_target,
    X_source, y_source,
    A = NULL,
    lambda_w = 0.0001,
    lambda_s = 0.01,
    max_iter = 1000,
    tol = 1e-6
) {
  # ================================================================
  # Step 0. 基本准备
  # ================================================================
  if (is.null(A)) A <- 1
  
  n0 <- nrow(X_target)
  nk <- nrow(X_source)
  p <- ncol(X_target)
  
  # 确保列名存在
  if (is.null(colnames(X_target))) {
    colnames(X_target) <- paste0("V", 1:p)
  }
  if (is.null(colnames(X_source))) {
    colnames(X_source) <- colnames(X_target)
  }
  
  # ================================================================
  # Step 1. Transferring step
  # ================================================================
  library(glmnet)
  
  X_tar_sour <- rbind(X_target, X_source)
  y_tar_sour <- c(y_target, y_source)
  
  fit_w <- glmnet(
    x = X_tar_sour,
    y = y_tar_sour,
    family = "binomial",
    alpha = 1,
    lambda = lambda_w,
    standardize = FALSE,
    maxit = max_iter
  )
  
  coef_w <- as.matrix(coef(fit_w, s = lambda_w))
  coef_names <- rownames(coef_w)
  intercept_w <- coef_w[1, 1]
  w_hat_A <- coef_w[-1, 1]
  names(w_hat_A) <- coef_names[-1]
  
  # ================================================================
  # Step 2. Debiasing step
  # ================================================================
  fit_delta <- glmnet(
    x = X_target,
    y = y_target,
    family = "binomial",
    alpha = 1,
    lambda = lambda_s,
    offset = as.vector(X_target %*% w_hat_A + intercept_w),
    standardize = FALSE,
    maxit = max_iter
  )
  
  coef_delta <- as.matrix(coef(fit_delta, s = lambda_s))
  intercept_delta <- coef_delta[1, 1]
  delta_hat_A <- coef_delta[-1, 1]
  names(delta_hat_A) <- coef_names[-1]
  
  # ================================================================
  # Step 3. 合并参数
  # ================================================================
  beta_hat <- w_hat_A + delta_hat_A
  intercept_beta <- intercept_w + intercept_delta
  
  # 生成结果表格
  coef_table <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(beta_hat),
    w_hat = round(w_hat_A, 6),
    delta_hat = round(delta_hat_A, 6),
    beta_hat = round(beta_hat, 6)
  )
  
  # ================================================================
  # Step 4. 输出结果
  # ================================================================
  result <- list(
    intercepts = list(
      intercept_w = intercept_w,
      intercept_delta = intercept_delta,
      intercept_beta = intercept_beta
    ),
    coef_table = coef_table,
    w_hat = w_hat_A,
    delta_hat = delta_hat_A,
    beta_hat = beta_hat,
    lambda_w = lambda_w,
    lambda_s = lambda_s
  )
  
  return(result)
}

result2 <- A_Trans_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  A = NULL,            # transferring set, 若设为 NULL 则默认使用所有源域
  lambda_w = 0.0001,     # transferring step 的 L1 正则参数
  lambda_s = 0.001,     # debiasing step 的 L1 正则参数
  max_iter = 1000,
  tol = 1e-6
)

result3 <- A_Trans_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  A = NULL,            # transferring set, 若设为 NULL 则默认使用所有源域
  lambda_w = 0.0001,     # transferring step 的 L1 正则参数
  lambda_s = 0.002,     # debiasing step 的 L1 正则参数
  max_iter = 1000,
  tol = 1e-6
)
###########################################
### Step5:计算迁移学习系数置信区间-pool ###
###########################################

C_Trans_CI_logistic <- function(
    X_target, y_target,
    X_source, y_source,
    result_trans,
    alpha = 0.05
) {
  # ============================
  # Step 0: 基本检查与参数
  # ============================
  if (is.null(result_trans) || is.null(result_trans$beta_hat)) {
    stop("参数 result_trans 必须提供，且包含 result_trans$beta_hat（无惩罚迁移估计量）。")
  }
  n0 <- nrow(X_target); ns <- nrow(X_source)
  N <- n0 + ns
  p <- ncol(X_target)
  if (is.null(colnames(X_target))) colnames(X_target) <- paste0("V", seq_len(p))
  coln <- colnames(X_target)
  
  # 最终估计量（无需再次纠偏，直接使用 Step 3 的结果）
  beta_hat <- as.numeric(result_trans$beta_hat)
  # 添加截距项，用于构建 X_pool
  intercept_beta <- as.numeric(result_trans$intercepts$intercept_beta)
  names(beta_hat) <- coln
  
  # 构造包含截距的池化设计矩阵 X* 和响应变量 Y
  X_pool <- rbind(X_target, X_source)
  X_pool_star <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_pool)
  y_pool <- c(y_target, y_source)
  
  # ============================
  # Step 1: 计算三明治估计量的“面包” A 和“肉馅” B
  # A = I_pool = X^T W X (Fisher Information)
  # B = t(U) %*% U (Score Variance)
  # ============================
  
  # 1. 计算线性预测器（包含截距）
  eta_pool <- as.numeric(X_pool_star %*% c(intercept_beta, beta_hat))
  
  # 2. 计算权重向量 W_vec = mu * (1 - mu) 和残差向量
  mu_pool <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_pool))
  W_pool_vec <- pmax(as.vector(mu_pool * (1 - mu_pool)), 1e-8) # 数值稳定
  resid_pool <- as.vector(y_pool - mu_pool)
  
  # 3. 计算“面包”项 A (Fisher Information)
  W_pool <- diag(W_pool_vec)
  A_mat <- t(X_pool_star) %*% W_pool %*% X_pool_star
  A_mat <- (A_mat + t(A_mat)) / 2 # 对称保护
  
  # 4. 计算“肉馅”项 B (Score Variance)
  # U 是 Score Function 对单个观测值的贡献: U_i = x_i * (y_i - mu_i)
  U_mat <- X_pool_star * resid_pool # n x (p+1) matrix
  B_mat <- t(U_mat) %*% U_mat
  B_mat <- (B_mat + t(B_mat)) / 2 # 对称保护
  
  # ============================
  # Step 2: 计算稳健协方差矩阵 V_sandwich
  # V_sandwich = A^(-1) * B * A^(-1)
  # ============================
  
  # 增加 Tikhonov 正则化（Ridge），增强求逆的稳定性
  ridge_term <- diag(1e-12, p + 1)
  
  # 计算 A_mat 的逆 (Bread_inv)
  Bread_inv <- tryCatch(
    solve(A_mat + ridge_term),
    error = function(e) MASS::ginv(A_mat) # 如果标准求逆失败，使用广义逆
  )
  
  # 构造三明治 V_sandwich
  V_mat_full <- Bread_inv %*% B_mat %*% Bread_inv
  V_mat_full <- (V_mat_full + t(V_mat_full)) / 2 # 确保最终矩阵对称
  
  # ============================
  # Step 3: 提取参数方差和标准误
  # ============================
  # 截距项的方差是 V_mat_full[1, 1]
  # 系数项的方差是 V_mat_full[-1, -1]
  var_j_full <- diag(V_mat_full)
  # 数值保护：确保方差非负
  var_j_full[var_j_full < 0] <- 0
  
  var_j <- var_j_full[-1] # 仅协变量的方差
  var_intercept <- var_j_full[1]
  
  se_j <- sqrt(var_j)
  se_intercept <- sqrt(var_intercept)
  
  # ============================
  # Step 4: 构造置信区间
  # ============================
  z_q <- qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)
  
  CI_lower <- beta_hat - z_q * se_j
  CI_upper <- beta_hat + z_q * se_j
  
  # 截距的 CI
  CI_lower_int <- intercept_beta - z_q * se_intercept
  CI_upper_int <- intercept_beta + z_q * se_intercept
  
  # 整合结果
  ci_table_coef <- data.frame(
    Variable = coln,
    Estimate = beta_hat,
    var_j = var_j,
    SE = se_j,
    CI_lower = CI_lower,
    CI_upper = CI_upper,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  ci_table_int <- data.frame(
    Variable = "(Intercept)",
    Estimate = intercept_beta,
    var_j = var_intercept,
    SE = se_intercept,
    CI_lower = CI_lower_int,
    CI_upper = CI_upper_int,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  result <- list(
    ci_table = rbind(ci_table_int, ci_table_coef),
    V_mat_full = V_mat_full,
    beta_hat = beta_hat,
    intercept_beta = intercept_beta
  )
  
  return(result)
}

result2_CI_C <- C_Trans_CI_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  result2,            # 必须：Algorithm1 的输出（包含 result_trans$beta_hat）
  alpha = 0.05
)

result3_CI_C <- C_Trans_CI_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  result3,            # 必须：Algorithm1 的输出（包含 result_trans$beta_hat）
  alpha = 0.05
)
#############################################
### Step5:计算迁移学习系数置信区间-target ###
#############################################

library(MASS) 
## 
## Attaching package: 'MASS'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     select
D_Trans_CI_logistic <- function(
    X_target, y_target,
    X_source, y_source, # 虽然传入了，但在本函数内仅用于提取 beta_hat
    result_trans,
    alpha = 0.05
) {
  # ============================
  # Step 0: 基本检查与参数 (与 C 方案相同)
  # ============================
  if (is.null(result_trans) || is.null(result_trans$beta_hat)) {
    stop("参数 result_trans 必须提供，且包含 result_trans$beta_hat（无惩罚迁移估计量）。")
  }
  n0 <- nrow(X_target) # 目标域样本量
  p <- ncol(X_target)
  if (is.null(colnames(X_target))) colnames(X_target) <- paste0("V", seq_len(p))
  coln <- colnames(X_target)
  
  # 最终估计量（来自 Pool-Debias 过程的最终结果）
  beta_hat <- as.numeric(result_trans$beta_hat)
  intercept_beta <- as.numeric(result_trans$intercepts$intercept_beta)
  names(beta_hat) <- coln
  
  # 构造包含截距的【目标域】设计矩阵 X* 和响应变量 Y
  # 注意：这里只使用 Target 数据，与 C 方案的关键区别
  X_target_star <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_target)
  
  # ============================
  # Step 1: 计算三明治估计量的“面包” A_T 和“肉馅” B_T (仅目标数据)
  # A_T = I_target = X_target^T W_target X_target
  # B_T = t(U_target) %*% U_target
  # ============================
  
  # 1. 计算线性预测器（使用最终估计量 beta_hat 在目标数据上）
  eta_target <- as.numeric(X_target_star %*% c(intercept_beta, beta_hat))
  
  # 2. 计算权重向量 W_vec = mu * (1 - mu) 和残差向量
  mu_target <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_target))
  W_target_vec <- pmax(as.vector(mu_target * (1 - mu_target)), 1e-8) # 数值稳定
  resid_target <- as.vector(y_target - mu_target)
  
  # 3. 计算“面包”项 A_T (Target Fisher Information)
  W_target <- diag(W_target_vec)
  A_mat <- t(X_target_star) %*% W_target %*% X_target_star
  A_mat <- (A_mat + t(A_mat)) / 2 # 对称保护
  
  # 4. 计算“肉馅”项 B_T (Target Score Variance)
  # U_i = x_i * (y_i - mu_i)
  U_mat <- X_target_star * resid_target # n0 x (p+1) matrix
  B_mat <- t(U_mat) %*% U_mat
  B_mat <- (B_mat + t(B_mat)) / 2 # 对称保护
  
  # ============================
  # Step 2: 计算稳健协方差矩阵 V_sandwich
  # V_sandwich = A_T^(-1) * B_T * A_T^(-1)
  # ============================
  
  # 增加 Tikhonov 正则化（Ridge），增强求逆的稳定性
  ridge_term <- diag(1e-12, p + 1)
  
  # 计算 A_mat 的逆 (Bread_inv)
  Bread_inv <- tryCatch(
    solve(A_mat + ridge_term),
    error = function(e) MASS::ginv(A_mat) # 如果标准求逆失败，使用广义逆
  )
  
  # 构造三明治 V_sandwich
  V_mat_full <- Bread_inv %*% B_mat %*% Bread_inv
  V_mat_full <- (V_mat_full + t(V_mat_full)) / 2 # 确保最终矩阵对称
  
  # ============================
  # Step 3: 提取参数方差和标准误 (与 C 方案相同)
  # ============================
  var_j_full <- diag(V_mat_full)
  var_j_full[var_j_full < 0] <- 0
  
  var_j <- var_j_full[-1] # 仅协变量的方差
  var_intercept <- var_j_full[1]
  
  se_j <- sqrt(var_j)
  se_intercept <- sqrt(var_intercept)
  
  # ============================
  # Step 4: 构造置信区间 (与 C 方案相同)
  # ============================
  z_q <- qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)
  
  CI_lower <- beta_hat - z_q * se_j
  CI_upper <- beta_hat + z_q * se_j
  
  # 截距的 CI
  CI_lower_int <- intercept_beta - z_q * se_intercept
  CI_upper_int <- intercept_beta + z_q * se_intercept
  
  # 整合结果
  ci_table_coef <- data.frame(
    Variable = coln,
    Estimate = beta_hat,
    var_j = var_j,
    SE = se_j,
    CI_lower = CI_lower,
    CI_upper = CI_upper,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  ci_table_int <- data.frame(
    Variable = "(Intercept)",
    Estimate = intercept_beta,
    var_j = var_intercept,
    SE = se_intercept,
    CI_lower = CI_lower_int,
    CI_upper = CI_upper_int,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  result <- list(
    ci_table = rbind(ci_table_int, ci_table_coef),
    V_mat_full = V_mat_full,
    beta_hat = beta_hat,
    intercept_beta = intercept_beta
  )
  
  return(result)
}

# 示例调用 (假设数据已加载)
result2_CI_D <- D_Trans_CI_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  result2,
  alpha = 0.05
)

result3_CI_D <- D_Trans_CI_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  result3,
  alpha = 0.05
)
##############################
### Step6:置信区间计算-GLM ###
##############################

# 拟合逻辑回归
glm_target <- glm(GDM ~ ., family = binomial(), data = tha_scaled_trun)

# 提取结果
glm_summary_target <- summary(glm_target)$coefficients
# 提取系数、标准误
coef_est <- coef(glm_target)
se_est   <- summary(glm_target)$coefficients[, "Std. Error"]

# 计算 95% CI
z_q <- qnorm(0.975)
CI_lower <- coef_est - z_q * se_est
CI_upper <- coef_est + z_q * se_est

# 构造数据框，与 trans_CI_df 对齐
glm_CI_df <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(coef_est),
  CI_lower_GLM = CI_lower,
  CI_upper_GLM = CI_upper,
  row.names = NULL,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
################################
### Step6:置信区间计算-Trans ###
################################

library(dplyr)

select_CI <- function(result, result_CI_C, result_CI_D) {
  
  # 1. 提取用于判断的 delta_hat/delta 列
  intercept_delta <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_delta)
  covariate_delta <- as.numeric(result$delta_hat)
  
  # 2. 构造 delta 数据框
  p <- length(covariate_delta)
  if (p != (nrow(result_CI_C$ci_table) - 1)) {
    stop("result$delta_hat 的长度与系数数量不匹配。")
  }
  
  delta_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = result_CI_C$ci_table$Variable,
    delta_val = c(
      intercept_delta,
      covariate_delta
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 3. 合并所有 CI 数据 (注意这里使用了 dplyr::select)
  merged_df <- delta_df %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      result_CI_C$ci_table %>% 
        # 强制使用 dplyr::select，解决冲突
        dplyr::select(Variable, CI_lower_C = CI_lower, CI_upper_C = CI_upper),
      by = "Variable"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      result_CI_D$ci_table %>% 
        # 强制使用 dplyr::select，解决冲突
        dplyr::select(Variable, CI_lower_D = CI_lower, CI_upper_D = CI_upper),
      by = "Variable"
    )
  
  # 4. 应用逻辑选择 CI
  trans_CI_df <- merged_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      CI_lower_Trans = ifelse(abs(delta_val) < 1e-6, CI_lower_C, CI_lower_D),
      CI_upper_Trans = ifelse(abs(delta_val) < 1e-6, CI_upper_C, CI_upper_D)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Variable, CI_lower_Trans, CI_upper_Trans)
    
  return(trans_CI_df)
}

trans_CI_df_2 <- select_CI(
  result = result2, 
  result_CI_C = result2_CI_C, 
  result_CI_D = result2_CI_D)

trans_CI_df_3 <- select_CI(
  result = result3, 
  result_CI_C = result3_CI_C, 
  result_CI_D = result3_CI_D)
##########################
### Step7:置信区间对比 ###
##########################

compare_CI <- merge(glm_CI_df, trans_CI_df_3, by = "Variable", all = TRUE)

# 计算区间长度与缩短比例
compare_CI$CI_len_GLM <- compare_CI$CI_upper_GLM - compare_CI$CI_lower_GLM
compare_CI$CI_len_Trans <- compare_CI$CI_upper_Trans - compare_CI$CI_lower_Trans
compare_CI$Shrink_Ratio <- compare_CI$CI_len_Trans / compare_CI$CI_len_GLM

compare_CI <- compare_CI[order(compare_CI$Variable), ]
print(compare_CI, digits = 4)
##       Variable CI_lower_GLM CI_upper_GLM CI_lower_Trans CI_upper_Trans
## 1  (Intercept)     -2.85879     -1.12719       -2.59158       -0.95203
## 2          Age     -0.11850      0.44620       -0.03743        0.51746
## 3      Age_phi     -0.19341      2.16469       -0.56857        1.76607
## 4         BMI2     -0.36600      0.89234        0.08636        0.54275
## 5         BMI3      0.02740      1.79259       -0.01269        1.71509
## 6         BMI4     -0.95659      1.52544        0.17624        1.12867
## 7   Ethnicity1     -0.05636      0.82126       -0.13260        0.74589
## 8           FF     -0.53412      0.01559       -0.51727        0.06947
## 9          ghb     -0.93226      0.16444       -0.77686        0.34792
## 10     ghb_phi      0.14007      1.56901       -0.10696        1.32543
## 11          HB      0.24098      0.80773        0.24072        0.77635
## 12        IVF1     -1.15046      1.99769       -0.59157        0.59157
## 13         MCH     -1.29665      1.30937       -0.47120       -0.02284
## 14         MCV     -1.48271      1.01606       -1.12406        1.18025
## 15     Parity1     -0.99780     -0.08330       -0.93723       -0.04422
##    CI_len_GLM CI_len_Trans Shrink_Ratio
## 1      1.7316       1.6396       0.9468
## 2      0.5647       0.5549       0.9826
## 3      2.3581       2.3346       0.9901
## 4      1.2583       0.4564       0.3627
## 5      1.7652       1.7278       0.9788
## 6      2.4820       0.9524       0.3837
## 7      0.8776       0.8785       1.0010
## 8      0.5497       0.5867       1.0674
## 9      1.0967       1.1248       1.0256
## 10     1.4289       1.4324       1.0024
## 11     0.5668       0.5356       0.9451
## 12     3.1482       1.1831       0.3758
## 13     2.6060       0.4484       0.1720
## 14     2.4988       2.3043       0.9222
## 15     0.9145       0.8930       0.9765
cat("\n平均置信区间缩短比例:",
    round(mean(compare_CI$Shrink_Ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
## 
## 平均置信区间缩短比例: 0.8088
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)

plot_data <- compare_CI %>%
  filter(Variable != "(Intercept)") %>%
  # 添加一个分类列，指示是缩短（<1）还是拉长（>1）
  mutate(
    Ratio_Category = ifelse(Shrink_Ratio < 1, "CI Shrinks (Better)", "CI Lengthens (Worse)"),
    # 对变量进行因子排序，按 Shrink Ratio 升序排列
    Variable = forcats::fct_reorder(Variable, Shrink_Ratio)
  )

p_shrink_ratio <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Variable, y = Shrink_Ratio, fill = Ratio_Category)) +
  
  # 绘制条形图
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  
  # 添加参考线 y=1，这是 GLM 和 Trans CI 长度相等的分界线
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  
  # 添加文字标签，显示具体的缩短比例
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Shrink_Ratio, 2)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "grey30") +
  
  # 设置填充颜色
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("CI Shrinks (Better)" = "#28a745", # 绿色
                               "CI Lengthens (Worse)" = "#dc3545")) + # 红色
  
  # 坐标轴和标题设置
  labs(
    title = "Confidence Interval Shrinkage Ratio by Variable",
    subtitle = "Ratio = Trans CI Length / GLM CI Length (Ratio < 1 indicates improvement)",
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Shrinkage Ratio (Trans/GLM)",
    fill = "CI Length Change" # 图例标题
  ) +
  
  # 调整主题
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
print(p_shrink_ratio)

################################
### Step7:置信区间可视化对比 ###
################################

select_SE <- function(result, result_CI_C, result_CI_D) {
  
  # 1. 提取用于判断的 delta_hat/delta 列
  intercept_delta <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_delta)
  covariate_delta <- as.numeric(result$delta_hat)
  
  # 2. 构造 delta 数据框
  p <- length(covariate_delta)
  if (p != (nrow(result_CI_C$ci_table) - 1)) {
    stop("result$delta_hat 的长度与系数数量不匹配。")
  }
  
  delta_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = result_CI_C$ci_table$Variable,
    delta_val = c(
      intercept_delta,
      covariate_delta
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 3. 合并所有 SE 数据
  merged_df <- delta_df %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      result_CI_C$ci_table %>% dplyr::select(Variable, SE_C = SE),
      by = "Variable"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      result_CI_D$ci_table %>% dplyr::select(Variable, SE_D = SE),
      by = "Variable"
    )
  
  # 4. 应用逻辑选择最终 SE
  final_SE_df <- merged_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      # 如果 delta_val 接近于 0，使用 C 方案的 SE (SE_C)
      # 否则使用 D 方案的 SE (SE_D)
      SE_final = ifelse(abs(delta_val) < 1e-6, SE_C, SE_D)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Variable, SE_final)
    
  return(final_SE_df)
}

final_SE_df_2 <- select_SE(result = result2, 
                         result_CI_C = result2_CI_C, 
                         result_CI_D = result2_CI_D)

# 从 result2_CI_C 中获取 Variable 列表和顺序作为参考
variable_names <- result2_CI_C$ci_table$Variable

# 提取并合并所有 Estimate 值
intercept_estimate <- as.numeric(result2$intercepts$intercept_beta)
covariate_estimate <- as.numeric(result2$beta_hat)

if (length(covariate_estimate) != (length(variable_names) - 1)) {
    stop("result$beta_hat 的长度与变量数量不匹配。")
}

# 构造完整的 Estimate 数据框
final_estimate_df_2 <- data.frame(
    Variable = variable_names,
    Estimate = c(
        intercept_estimate,
        covariate_estimate
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
                                        
# 3. 合并最终的 Estimate 和最终选择的 SE
final_results_trans_2 <- final_estimate_df_2 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(final_SE_df_2, by = "Variable")
final_results_trans_2$z_value <- with(final_results_trans_2, Estimate / SE_final)
final_results_trans_2$p_value <- with(final_results_trans_2, 2 * pnorm(abs(z_value), lower.tail = FALSE))

# 4. 构造命名向量，用于 calc_curve_with_ci
coef_trans_2 <- setNames(final_results_trans_2$Estimate, final_results_trans_2$Variable)
se_trans_2 <- setNames(final_results_trans_2$SE_final, final_results_trans_2$Variable)

# 关键变量列表 (假设 tau_df_tha 和 tha_scaled 已加载)
key_vars_list <- list(
  ghb = list(tau = tau_df_tha_ghb_trun$Threshold[tau_df_tha_ghb_trun$Variable == "ghb"], 
             seq = seq(min(tha_scaled_trun$ghb), max(tha_scaled_trun$ghb), length.out = 200)),
  Age = list(tau = tau_df_tha_Age_trun$Threshold[tau_df_tha_Age_trun$Variable == "Age"], 
             seq = seq(min(tha_scaled_trun$Age), max(tha_scaled_trun$Age), length.out = 200))
)

all_df <- list()
################################
### Step7:置信区间可视化对比 ###
################################

calc_curve_with_ci <- function(x_seq, tau,
                               key_var,           # 关键变量名
                               beta_g, beta_phi,
                               se_g, se_phi,
                               zval = qnorm(0.975),
                               model_label = "model",
                               coef_all = NULL,
                               se_all_full = NULL, # 新增：包含所有变量SE的命名向量
                               X_ref = NULL) {
  
  # 构造阈值交互项的名称
  phi_var <- paste0(key_var, "_phi")
  
  # --- 1. 固定其他协变量在均值并计算 base_term ---
  
  intercept <- if ("(Intercept)" %in% names(coef_all)) coef_all["(Intercept)"] else 0
  other_vars <- setdiff(names(coef_all), c("(Intercept)", key_var, phi_var))
  base_term <- intercept 
  
  fixed_term_variance <- 0 # 初始化固定项的方差贡献
  
  if (!is.null(X_ref) && length(other_vars) > 0) {
    x_fixed_names <- intersect(other_vars, colnames(X_ref))
    
    if (length(x_fixed_names) > 0) {
        x_fixed <- colMeans(X_ref[, x_fixed_names, drop = FALSE])
        # 累加其他变量的贡献（系数乘以均值）到 base_term
        base_term <- base_term + sum(x_fixed * coef_all[names(x_fixed)])

        # --- 2. 计算固定项的方差贡献 ---
        
        # 提取固定项（非关键项）的SE
        se_fixed <- se_all_full[names(x_fixed)]
        
        # 贡献项 = (均值)^2 * (SE)^2
        # 注意：这里我们假设 x_fixed 中的顺序与 se_fixed 中的顺序匹配
        if (all(names(x_fixed) == names(se_fixed))) {
            fixed_term_variance <- sum((x_fixed^2) * (se_fixed^2))
        } else {
            # 如果不匹配，使用更安全的命名提取
             fixed_term_variance <- sum((x_fixed^2) * se_all_full[names(x_fixed)]^2)
        }
    }
  }
  
  # --- 3. Logit(p) 均值计算 (不变) ---
  I_gt <- as.numeric(x_seq > tau)
  logit_p <- base_term + beta_g * x_seq + I_gt * (beta_phi * (x_seq - tau))
  
  # --- 4. Delta 法计算 var(logit)（包含所有 Var(beta)）---
  
  # A. 截距项方差贡献
  var_intercept <- se_all_full["(Intercept)"]^2
  
  # B. 固定协变量方差贡献 (已在上面计算)
  var_fixed_terms <- fixed_term_variance 
  
  # C. 关键变量及阈值项方差贡献 (原代码部分)
  var_key_terms <- (x_seq^2) * (se_g^2) + I_gt * ((x_seq - tau)^2) * (se_phi^2)
  
  # 总方差 = A + B + C (忽略所有协方差)
  var_logit <- var_intercept + var_fixed_terms + var_key_terms
  se_logit <- sqrt(var_logit)
  
  # --- 5. CI 和 Predicted Probability 计算 (不变) ---
  logit_low <- logit_p - zval * se_logit
  logit_up <- logit_p + zval * se_logit
  
  OR <- exp(logit_p); OR_low <- exp(logit_low); OR_up <- exp(logit_up)
  p_hat <- 1 / (1 + exp(-logit_p)); p_low <- 1 / (1 + exp(-logit_low)); p_up <- 1 / (1 + exp(-logit_up))
  
  data.frame(
    x_var = x_seq,
    logit = logit_p, logit_low = logit_low, logit_up = logit_up,
    OR = OR, OR_low = OR_low, OR_up = OR_up, 
    p = p_hat, p_low = p_low, p_up = p_up,
    model = model_label,
    key_var = key_var,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

for (key_var in names(key_vars_list)) {
  
  # 在循环内部定义所有必要的局部变量：
  tau <- key_vars_list[[key_var]]$tau
  x_seq <- key_vars_list[[key_var]]$seq
  phi_var <- paste0(key_var, "_phi")
  
  message(paste("Calculating curves for GLM:", key_var))
  
  # --- GLM 计算 ---
  df_glm <- calc_curve_with_ci(
    x_seq = x_seq, tau = tau, key_var = key_var,
    beta_g = coef_est[key_var],
    beta_phi = coef_est[phi_var],
    se_g = se_est[key_var],
    se_phi = se_est[phi_var],
    coef_all = coef_est,
    se_all_full = se_est, # GLM SE
    X_ref = X_target_2, # 假设 GLM 和 Trans 使用相同的参考数据进行曲线绘制
    model_label = "GLM"
  )
  
  # --- A-Trans 计算 ---
  message(paste("Calculating curves for A-Trans:", key_var))
  
  df_trans <- calc_curve_with_ci(
    x_seq = x_seq, tau = tau, key_var = key_var,
    beta_g = coef_trans_2[key_var],
    beta_phi = coef_trans_2[phi_var],
    se_g = se_trans_2[key_var],
    se_phi = se_trans_2[phi_var],
    coef_all = coef_trans_2,
    se_all_full = se_trans_2, # Trans SE
    X_ref = X_target_2, 
    model_label = "A-Trans"
  )
  
  # 合并 GLM 和 Trans 结果
  all_df[[key_var]] <- rbind(df_glm, df_trans)
}
## Calculating curves for GLM: ghb
## Calculating curves for A-Trans: ghb
## Calculating curves for GLM: Age
## Calculating curves for A-Trans: Age
# 合并所有计算结果，用于绘图
combined_plot_data_2 <- do.call(rbind, all_df)
################################
### Step7:置信区间可视化对比 ###
################################

library(ggplot2); library(gridExtra)
## 
## Attaching package: 'gridExtra'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     combine
library(dplyr) 

plot_curve_all <- function(combined_df, tau, key_var_name, x_label_name, x_col="x_var_original") {
  
  # 筛选当前要绘制的变量的数据
  plot_data <- combined_df %>%
    filter(key_var == key_var_name)
  
  # 确保 tau 是单一数值，否则取第一个
  if(length(tau) > 1) {
      tau <- tau[1]
  }
  
  # --- 1. 动态确定 X 轴的范围（新增的关键步骤） ---
  # 提取 x_var_original 列的最小值和最大值
  x_min <- min(plot_data[[x_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  x_max <- max(plot_data[[x_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 设置一个小的缓冲区域（例如 5%）
  x_buffer <- 0.05 * (x_max - x_min)
  x_range <- c(x_min - x_buffer, x_max + x_buffer)
  
  
  # --- 2. 创建 Logit(p) 对比图 (p_logit) ---
  p_logit <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = logit, color = model, fill = model)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = logit_low, ymax = logit_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
    geom_line(size = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = tau, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_text(
    x = tau, # X 坐标设置为 tau
    y = max(plot_data$logit_up, na.rm = TRUE), # Y 坐标设置为 Logit 曲线置信区间的最大值
    label = paste("τ =", round(tau, 3)), # 标签内容：四舍五入到小数点后三位
    color = "red", 
    vjust = -0.5, # 垂直向上微调
    hjust = 0,    # 水平靠右对齐（使标签位于虚线右侧）
    size = 3.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE # 必须是 FALSE，避免继承 aes(color=model) 等设置
  ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "A-Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "A-Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
    
    # *** 强制设置 X 轴范围 ***
    coord_cartesian(xlim = x_range) + 
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Logit(p) Curve (", x_label_name, ")"),
      x = x_label_name,
      y = "Logit(p)",
      color = "Model", fill = "Model"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  # --- 3. 创建 Predicted p 对比图 (p_prob) ---
  p_prob <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = p, color = model, fill = model)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = p_low, ymax = p_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
    geom_line(size = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = tau, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_text(
    x = tau, # X 坐标设置为 tau
    y = max(plot_data$logit_up, na.rm = TRUE), # Y 坐标设置为 Logit 曲线置信区间的最大值
    label = paste("τ =", round(tau, 3)), # 标签内容：四舍五入到小数点后三位
    color = "red", 
    vjust = -0.5, # 垂直向上微调
    hjust = 0,    # 水平靠右对齐（使标签位于虚线右侧）
    size = 3.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE # 必须是 FALSE，避免继承 aes(color=model) 等设置
  ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "A-Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "A-Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
    
    # *** 强制设置 X 轴范围 ***
    coord_cartesian(xlim = x_range) + 
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Predicted Probability Curve (", x_label_name, ")"),
      x = x_label_name,
      y = "Predicted Probability (p)",
      color = "Model", fill = "Model"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
    
  # --- 4. 新增 OR 对比图 (p_OR) ---
  p_OR <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = OR, color = model, fill = model)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = OR_low, ymax = OR_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
    geom_line(size = 0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1.0, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") + # OR=1.0 参考线
    geom_vline(xintercept = tau, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_text(
    x = tau, # X 坐标设置为 tau
    y = max(plot_data$logit_up, na.rm = TRUE), # Y 坐标设置为 Logit 曲线置信区间的最大值
    label = paste("τ =", round(tau, 3)), # 标签内容：四舍五入到小数点后三位
    color = "red", 
    vjust = -0.5, # 垂直向上微调
    hjust = 0,    # 水平靠右对齐（使标签位于虚线右侧）
    size = 3.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE # 必须是 FALSE，避免继承 aes(color=model) 等设置
  ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "A-Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "A-Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
    
    # *** 强制设置 X 轴范围 ***
    coord_cartesian(xlim = x_range) + 
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Odds Ratio Curve (", x_label_name, ")"),
      x = x_label_name,
      y = "Odds Ratio (OR)",
      color = "Model", fill = "Model"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  return(list(p1 = p_logit, p2 = p_prob, p3 = p_OR)) 
}
################################
### Step7:置信区间可视化对比 ###
################################

# --- A. 提取标准化参数 ---

get_params <- function(var_name, dataset) {
  
  var_scaled <- dataset[[var_name]]
  mu <- attr(var_scaled, "scaled:center")
  sigma <- attr(var_scaled, "scaled:scale")
  
  if (is.null(mu) || is.null(sigma)) {
      stop(paste("Standardization attributes (center/scale) not found for", var_name))
  }
  
  return(list(mu = mu, sigma = sigma))
}

# --- B. 循环计算和反向标准化 ---

scaling_df <- data.frame(key_var = names(key_vars_list)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # 使用 get_params 函数获取 mu 和 sigma
    params = list(get_params(key_var, tha_scaled_trun)),
    mu_val = params$mu,
    sigma_val = params$sigma
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(key_var, mu_val, sigma_val)

combined_plot_data_2 <- combined_plot_data_2 %>%
  # 1. 合并标准化参数查找表
  left_join(scaling_df, by = "key_var") %>%
  
  # 2. 计算 x_var_original
  mutate(
    # X_original = X_scaled * sigma + mu
    x_var_original = x_var * sigma_val + mu_val
  ) %>%
  
  # 3. 移除用于计算的临时列
  dplyr::select(-mu_val, -sigma_val)

# --- C. 调用新的绘图函数 ---

# 原始尺度的阈值 tau 是需要展示在图上的红线
# 由于模型在标准化尺度上拟合和识别 tau，我们通常反向标准化 tau 来得到原始尺度的位置。

# 假设 tau_df_tha_ghb_trun 和 tau_df_tha_Age 中包含的 tau 是标准化后的。

# 1. ghb 图
ghb_params <- get_params("ghb", tha_scaled_trun)
tau_ghb_original <- key_vars_list$ghb$tau * ghb_params$sigma + ghb_params$mu

ghb_plots <- plot_curve_all(combined_plot_data_2, tau_ghb_original, "ghb", "ghb (Original Scale)")

grid.arrange(ghb_plots$p1, ghb_plots$p2, ncol = 2, 
             top = "ghb Threshold Effect: Logit and Predicted Probability")

# 2. Age 图
age_params <- get_params("Age", tha_scaled_trun)
tau_age_original <- key_vars_list$Age$tau * age_params$sigma + age_params$mu

age_plots <- plot_curve_all(combined_plot_data_2, tau_age_original, "Age", "Age (Original Scale)")

grid.arrange(age_plots$p1, age_plots$p2, ncol = 2, 
             top = "Age Threshold Effect: Logit and Predicted Probability")

################################
### Step8:AIC、AUC等指标对比 ###
################################

library(dplyr)
library(pROC)
## Type 'citation("pROC")' for a citation.
## 
## Attaching package: 'pROC'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     cov, smooth, var
library(stats)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 1 & 2: 预测和评估函数（保持不变）
# ----------------------------------------------------

#' 核心预测函数：计算 Logit 模型下的预测概率
#' @param X 协变量矩阵（列名必须与Beta的名称匹配）
#' @param Beta 系数向量
predict_glm_prob <- function(X, Beta) {
  # 确保 X 矩阵的列名与 Beta 的名称匹配
  if (!all(colnames(X) == names(Beta))) {
    stop("X 矩阵的列顺序与 Beta 向量的名称不匹配，请先匹配。")
  }
  linear_predictor <- X %*% Beta
  probabilities <- 1 / (1 + exp(-linear_predictor))
  return(as.vector(probabilities))
}

#' 核心评估函数：计算 AIC 和 AUC
evaluate_model <- function(probabilities, actual_y, num_params) {
  # 计算对数似然
  logLik <- sum(actual_y * log(probabilities) + (1 - actual_y) * log(1 - probabilities), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 1. 计算 AIC: AIC = -2 * logLik + 2 * k
  aic_value <- -2 * logLik + 2 * num_params
  
  # 2. 计算 AUC
  auc_roc <- tryCatch({
    roc_obj <- roc(actual_y, probabilities, quiet = TRUE)
    auc(roc_obj)
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("AUC calculation failed.")
    return(NA)
  })
  
  return(list(AIC = aic_value, AUC = auc_roc))
}

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 3: 评估 GLM 模型 (基于 coef_est)
# ----------------------------------------------------

X_target_2_intercept <- cbind("(Intercept)" = 1, X_target_2)

# 获取 GLM 模型所需的协变量名称和顺序
coef_names_est <- names(coef_est)

# 重新排列/选择 X 矩阵的列，使其与 coef_est 的名称顺序严格一致
X_est_matched <- X_target_2_intercept[, coef_names_est, drop = FALSE]

prob_est <- predict_glm_prob(X_est_matched, coef_est)
k_est <- length(coef_est) 
eval_est <- evaluate_model(prob_est, y_target_2, k_est)


# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 4: 评估 A-Trans/阈值 GLM 模型 (基于 coef_trans)
# ----------------------------------------------------

# 获取 A-Trans 模型所需的协变量名称和顺序（这些名称应包含阈值项的名称）
coef_names_trans_2 <- names(coef_trans_2)

# 重新排列/选择 X 矩阵的列，使其与 coef_trans 的名称顺序严格一致
X_trans_matched_2 <- X_target_2_intercept[, coef_names_trans_2, drop = FALSE]

prob_trans_2 <- predict_glm_prob(X_trans_matched_2, coef_trans_2)
k_trans_2 <- length(coef_trans_2)
eval_trans_2 <- evaluate_model(prob_trans_2, y_target_2, k_trans_2)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 5: 生成对比表格
# ----------------------------------------------------

comparison_table_2 <- data.frame(
  Model = c("GLM (coef_est)", "A-Trans(coef_trans)"),
  AIC = c(eval_est$AIC, eval_trans_2$AIC),
  AUC = c(eval_est$AUC, eval_trans_2$AUC),
  Num_Parameters = c(k_est, k_trans_2)
) %>%
  mutate(
    AIC = round(AIC, 3),
    AUC = round(AUC, 3)
  )

print("--- 模型评估对比表 ---")
## [1] "--- 模型评估对比表 ---"
print(comparison_table_2)
##                 Model     AIC   AUC Num_Parameters
## 1      GLM (coef_est) 573.530 0.705             15
## 2 A-Trans(coef_trans) 574.199 0.703             15
##################################
### Step9:惩罚超参数敏感度测试 ###
##################################

final_SE_df_3 <- select_SE(result = result3, 
                         result_CI_C = result3_CI_C, 
                         result_CI_D = result3_CI_D)

# 从 result2_CI_C 中获取 Variable 列表和顺序作为参考
variable_names <- result3_CI_C$ci_table$Variable

# 提取并合并所有 Estimate 值
intercept_estimate <- as.numeric(result3$intercepts$intercept_beta)
covariate_estimate <- as.numeric(result3$beta_hat)

if (length(covariate_estimate) != (length(variable_names) - 1)) {
    stop("result$beta_hat 的长度与变量数量不匹配。")
}

# 构造完整的 Estimate 数据框
final_estimate_df_3 <- data.frame(
    Variable = variable_names,
    Estimate = c(
        intercept_estimate,
        covariate_estimate
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
                                        
# 3. 合并最终的 Estimate 和最终选择的 SE
final_results_trans_3 <- final_estimate_df_3 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(final_SE_df_3, by = "Variable")
final_results_trans_3$z_value <- with(final_results_trans_3, Estimate / SE_final)
final_results_trans_3$p_value <- with(final_results_trans_3, 2 * pnorm(abs(z_value), lower.tail = FALSE))

# 4. 构造命名向量，用于 calc_curve_with_ci
coef_trans_3 <- setNames(final_results_trans_3$Estimate, final_results_trans_3$Variable)
se_trans_3 <- setNames(final_results_trans_3$SE_final, final_results_trans_3$Variable)
##################################
### Step9:惩罚超参数敏感度测试 ###
##################################

for (key_var in names(key_vars_list)) {
  
  # 在循环内部定义所有必要的局部变量：
  tau <- key_vars_list[[key_var]]$tau
  x_seq <- key_vars_list[[key_var]]$seq
  phi_var <- paste0(key_var, "_phi")
  
  message(paste("Calculating curves for GLM:", key_var))
  
  # --- GLM 计算 ---
  df_glm <- calc_curve_with_ci(
    x_seq = x_seq, tau = tau, key_var = key_var,
    beta_g = coef_est[key_var],
    beta_phi = coef_est[phi_var],
    se_g = se_est[key_var],
    se_phi = se_est[phi_var],
    coef_all = coef_est,
    se_all_full = se_est, # GLM SE
    X_ref = X_target_2, # 假设 GLM 和 Trans 使用相同的参考数据进行曲线绘制
    model_label = "GLM"
  )
  
  # --- A-Trans 计算 ---
  message(paste("Calculating curves for A-Trans:", key_var))
  
  df_trans <- calc_curve_with_ci(
    x_seq = x_seq, tau = tau, key_var = key_var,
    beta_g = coef_trans_3[key_var],
    beta_phi = coef_trans_3[phi_var],
    se_g = se_trans_3[key_var],
    se_phi = se_trans_3[phi_var],
    coef_all = coef_trans_3,
    se_all_full = se_trans_3, # Trans SE
    X_ref = X_target_2, 
    model_label = "A-Trans"
  )
  
  # 合并 GLM 和 Trans 结果
  all_df[[key_var]] <- rbind(df_glm, df_trans)
}
## Calculating curves for GLM: ghb
## Calculating curves for A-Trans: ghb
## Calculating curves for GLM: Age
## Calculating curves for A-Trans: Age
# 合并所有计算结果，用于绘图
combined_plot_data_3 <- do.call(rbind, all_df)
##################################
### Step9:惩罚超参数敏感度测试 ###
##################################

combined_plot_data_3 <- combined_plot_data_3 %>%
  # 1. 合并标准化参数查找表
  left_join(scaling_df, by = "key_var") %>%
  
  # 2. 计算 x_var_original
  mutate(
    # X_original = X_scaled * sigma + mu
    x_var_original = x_var * sigma_val + mu_val
  ) %>%
  
  # 3. 移除用于计算的临时列
  dplyr::select(-mu_val, -sigma_val)

# 1. ghb 图
ghb_params <- get_params("ghb", tha_scaled_trun)
tau_ghb_original <- key_vars_list$ghb$tau * ghb_params$sigma + ghb_params$mu

ghb_plots <- plot_curve_all(combined_plot_data_3, tau_ghb_original, "ghb", "ghb (Original Scale)")

grid.arrange(ghb_plots$p1, ghb_plots$p2, ncol = 2, 
             top = "ghb Threshold Effect: Logit and Predicted Probability")

# 2. Age 图
age_params <- get_params("Age", tha_scaled_trun)
tau_age_original <- key_vars_list$Age$tau * age_params$sigma + age_params$mu

age_plots <- plot_curve_all(combined_plot_data_3, tau_age_original, "Age", "Age (Original Scale)")

grid.arrange(age_plots$p1, age_plots$p2, ncol = 2, 
             top = "Age Threshold Effect: Logit and Predicted Probability")

##################################
### Step9:惩罚超参数敏感度测试 ###
##################################

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 4: 评估 A-Trans/阈值 GLM 模型 (基于 coef_trans)
# ----------------------------------------------------

# 获取 A-Trans 模型所需的协变量名称和顺序（这些名称应包含阈值项的名称）
coef_names_trans_3 <- names(coef_trans_3)

# 重新排列/选择 X 矩阵的列，使其与 coef_trans 的名称顺序严格一致
X_trans_matched_3 <- X_target_2_intercept[, coef_names_trans_3, drop = FALSE]

prob_trans_3 <- predict_glm_prob(X_trans_matched_3, coef_trans_3)
k_trans_3 <- length(coef_trans_3)
eval_trans_3 <- evaluate_model(prob_trans_3, y_target_2, k_trans_3)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 5: 生成对比表格
# ----------------------------------------------------

comparison_table_3 <- data.frame(
  Model = c("GLM (coef_est)", "A-Trans(coef_trans)"),
  AIC = c(eval_est$AIC, eval_trans_3$AIC),
  AUC = c(eval_est$AUC, eval_trans_3$AUC),
  Num_Parameters = c(k_est, k_trans_3)
) %>%
  mutate(
    AIC = round(AIC, 3),
    AUC = round(AUC, 3)
  )

print("--- 模型评估对比表 ---")
## [1] "--- 模型评估对比表 ---"
print(comparison_table_3)
##                 Model     AIC   AUC Num_Parameters
## 1      GLM (coef_est) 573.530 0.705             15
## 2 A-Trans(coef_trans) 575.533 0.700             15
#################################
### Step10:阈值是否相等的检验 ###
#################################

# =================== 阈值检测（ghb，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据） ===================

alpha_level <- 0.1

best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init <- NA
# best_tau_age_tha <- NA
pval_ghb_trun <- NA
# pval_age <- NA

# 初始模型公式（无阈值项）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb"

# 1️⃣ 拟合基础模型
