base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = tha_cleaned_trun)

# 2️⃣ 检测 ghb 阈值效应
st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = tha_cleaned_trun$ghb,
  Y = tha_cleaned_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb_trun <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb_trun, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.04335
# 若显著，估计 tau 并加入模型
if (!is.na(pval_ghb_trun) && pval_ghb_trun < alpha_level) {
  est_ghb <- estimate_tau_by_grid(
    var_vec = tha_cleaned_trun$ghb,
    dat_full = tha_cleaned_trun,
    base_formula = initial_formula,
    ngrid = 100
  )
  best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init <- est_ghb$best_tau
  
  # ---- 结果汇总 ----
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("ghb 阈值效应: p = %s (显著)\n", formatC(pval_ghb_trun, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init))
  
} else {
  # 若不显著，也输出默认建议
  best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init <- median(tha_cleaned_trun$ghb, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("ghb 阈值效应: p = %s (不显著)\n", formatC(pval_ghb_trun, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 中位数) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init))
}
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## ---- 阈值检测总结 ----
## 显著性水平 α = 0.1 
## 
## ghb 阈值效应: p = 0.0433 (显著)
## 推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = 5.1162
cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据）===============
tryCatch({
  
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(ghb = best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init)  # 单阈值初始值
  
  # 🔹全局变量供 ToSNR_logistic 使用
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- tha_cleaned_trun$GDM
  X <- tha_cleaned_trun$ghb
  Z_vars <- c("Age","Ethnicity","IVF","Parity","BMI","HB","MCH","MCV","FF")
  Z <- tha_cleaned_trun[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_ghb <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_ghb_tha_trun_init <- tau_ghb
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 Age_phi ----
  tha_cleaned_trun$ghb_phi <- as.numeric(tha_cleaned_trun$ghb > tau_ghb) * (tha_cleaned_trun$ghb - tau_ghb)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, ghb = X, ghb_phi = tha_cleaned_trun$ghb_phi, Z)
  glm_final_tha_init <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_tha_init))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_tha_init, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_tha_ghb_trun_init <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_ghb),
    Threshold = tau_ghb
  )
  print(tau_df_tha_ghb_trun_init)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（ghb）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -2.045134   4.026791  -0.508 0.611536    
## ghb         -0.941020   0.689565  -1.365 0.172361    
## ghb_phi      2.052664   0.897424   2.287 0.022179 *  
## Age          0.080167   0.030474   2.631 0.008521 ** 
## Ethnicity    0.368399   0.222938   1.652 0.098437 .  
## IVF1         0.573889   0.780696   0.735 0.462279    
## Parity1     -0.530010   0.231343  -2.291 0.021963 *  
## BMI2         0.256372   0.321032   0.799 0.424531    
## BMI3         0.925412   0.449567   2.058 0.039547 *  
## BMI4         0.314349   0.627620   0.501 0.616471    
## HB           0.050670   0.014132   3.585 0.000337 ***
## MCH         -0.001077   0.235181  -0.005 0.996347    
## MCV         -0.030591   0.084730  -0.361 0.718074    
## FF          -0.007424   0.003980  -1.865 0.062155 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 604.30  on 497  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 546.21  on 484  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 574.21
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = 0.6987
##     Variable Threshold
## ghb      ghb  5.127618
# =================== 阈值检测（ghb2，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = tha_cleaned_trun)

st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = tha_cleaned_trun$ghb,
  Y = tha_cleaned_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb_trun <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb_trun, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.8538
# =================== 阈值检测（Age，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据） ===================

# ---- 检测 Age 阈值效应 ----
st_age_simp <- score_test_for_threshold_simp(
  var_vec = tha_cleaned_trun$Age,
  Y = tha_cleaned_trun$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  tau = c(34)
)
pval_Age_trun <- st_age_simp$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_Age_trun, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.09982
best_tau_age_tha_init <- 34

cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age，使用tha_cleaned_trun数据）===============
tryCatch({
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(Age = 34)
  
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- tha_cleaned_trun$GDM
  X <- tha_cleaned_trun$Age
  Z_vars <- c("ghb", "ghb_phi", "Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI", "HB", "MCH", "MCV", "FF")
  Z <- tha_cleaned_trun[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_age <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_age_tha_init <- tau_age
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 Age_phi ----
  tha_cleaned_trun$Age_phi <- as.numeric(tha_cleaned_trun$Age > tau_age) * (tha_cleaned_trun$Age - tau_age)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, Age = X, Age_phi = tha_cleaned_trun$Age_phi, Z)
  glm_final_tha_init <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_tha_init))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_tha_init, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_tha_Age_trun_init <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_age),
    Threshold = tau_age
  )
  print(tau_df_tha_Age_trun_init)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（Age）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -1.104769   4.075395  -0.271 0.786327    
## Age          0.042815   0.037643   1.137 0.255369    
## Age_phi      0.257549   0.157191   1.638 0.101328    
## ghb         -0.949265   0.691772  -1.372 0.169994    
## ghb_phi      2.112934   0.901346   2.344 0.019068 *  
## Ethnicity    0.382448   0.223886   1.708 0.087594 .  
## IVF1         0.423615   0.803116   0.527 0.597871    
## Parity1     -0.540553   0.233295  -2.317 0.020502 *  
## BMI2         0.263169   0.321009   0.820 0.412320    
## BMI3         0.909998   0.450312   2.021 0.043299 *  
## BMI4         0.284426   0.633183   0.449 0.653287    
## HB           0.051498   0.014200   3.627 0.000287 ***
## MCH          0.002261   0.236311   0.010 0.992365    
## MCV         -0.031152   0.085107  -0.366 0.714343    
## FF          -0.007411   0.004008  -1.849 0.064492 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 604.30  on 497  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 543.53  on 483  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 573.53
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = 0.7048
##     Variable Threshold
## Age      Age  34.18991
#################################
### Step10:阈值是否相等的检验 ###
#################################

# =================== 阈值检测（ghb，使用norm_init数据） ===================

alpha_level <- 0.1

best_tau_ghb_norm_init <- NA
# best_tau_age_norm <- NA
pval_ghb <- NA
# pval_age <- NA

# 初始模型公式（无阈值项）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb"

# 1️⃣ 拟合基础模型
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm_init)

# 2️⃣ 检测 ghb 阈值效应
st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm_init$ghb,
  Y = norm_init$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.00186
# 若显著，估计 tau 并加入模型
if (!is.na(pval_ghb) && pval_ghb < alpha_level) {
  est_ghb <- estimate_tau_by_grid(
    var_vec = norm_init$ghb,
    dat_full = norm_init,
    base_formula = initial_formula,
    ngrid = 100
  )
  best_tau_ghb_norm_init <- est_ghb$best_tau
  
  # ---- 结果汇总 ----
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("ghb 阈值效应: p = %s (显著)\n", formatC(pval_ghb, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_norm_init))
  
} else {
  # 若不显著，也输出默认建议
  best_tau_ghb_norm_init <- median(norm_init$ghb, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("Age 阈值效应: p = %s (不显著)\n", formatC(pval_age, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 中位数) = %.4f\n", best_tau_ghb_norm_init))
}
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## ---- 阈值检测总结 ----
## 显著性水平 α = 0.1 
## 
## ghb 阈值效应: p = 0.0019 (显著)
## 推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = 4.7773
cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用norm_init数据）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（ghb，使用norm_init数据）===============
tryCatch({
  
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(ghb = best_tau_ghb_norm_init)  # 单阈值初始值
  
  # 🔹全局变量供 ToSNR_logistic 使用
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- norm_init$GDM
  X <- norm_init$ghb
  Z_vars <- c("Age","Ethnicity","IVF","Parity","BMI","HB","MCH","MCV","FF")
  Z <- norm_init[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_ghb <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_ghb_norm_init <- tau_ghb
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 ghb_phi ----
  norm_init$ghb_phi <- as.numeric(norm_init$ghb > tau_ghb) * (norm_init$ghb - tau_ghb)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, ghb = X, ghb_phi = norm_init$ghb_phi, Z)
  glm_final_norm_init <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_norm_init))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_norm_init, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_norm_ghb_init <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_ghb),
    Threshold = tau_ghb
  )
  print(tau_df_norm_ghb_init)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（ghb）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -3.6468339  2.0715467  -1.760   0.0783 .  
## ghb         -0.8212363  0.3915946  -2.097   0.0360 *  
## ghb_phi      2.1787727  0.4697918   4.638 3.52e-06 ***
## Age          0.0701705  0.0112663   6.228 4.71e-10 ***
## Ethnicity1  -0.0070217  0.1866863  -0.038   0.9700    
## IVF1        -0.0865008  0.2910122  -0.297   0.7663    
## Parity1     -0.2215059  0.0949684  -2.332   0.0197 *  
## BMI1        -0.3297936  0.1417026  -2.327   0.0199 *  
## BMI3         0.2728120  0.1440702   1.894   0.0583 .  
## BMI4         0.3826891  0.2185279   1.751   0.0799 .  
## HB           0.0324222  0.0052854   6.134 8.55e-10 ***
## MCH         -0.1156448  0.0549713  -2.104   0.0354 *  
## MCV          0.0367030  0.0212257   1.729   0.0838 .  
## FF           0.0002742  0.0012895   0.213   0.8316    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 3402.3  on 2960  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 3193.0  on 2947  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 3221
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（ghb）联合 AUC = 0.6716
##     Variable Threshold
## ghb      ghb  4.787225
# =================== 阈值检测（ghb2，使用norm_init数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm_init)

st_ghb <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm_init$ghb,
  Y = norm_init$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_ghb <- st_ghb$p.value
cat("ghb 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_ghb, 4), "\n")
## ghb 阈值效应 p-value = 0.8275
# =================== 阈值检测（Age，使用 norm_init数据） ===================

alpha_level <- 0.1

# best_tau_ghb_norm <- NA   # 保留原变量名（方便后续兼容）
best_tau_age_norm_init <- NA
# pval_ghb <- NA
pval_age <- NA

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm_init)

# ---- 检测 Age 阈值效应 ----
st_age <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm_init$Age,
  Y = norm_init$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_age <- st_age$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_age, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.02537
# 若显著，则估计 tau 并更新模型
if (!is.na(pval_age) && pval_age < alpha_level) {
  est_age <- estimate_tau_by_grid(
    var_vec = norm_init$Age,
    dat_full = norm_init,
    base_formula = initial_formula,
    ngrid = 100
  )
  best_tau_age_norm_init <- est_age$best_tau
  
  # ---- 结果汇总 ----
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("Age 阈值效应: p = %s (显著)\n", formatC(pval_age, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_age_norm_init))
  
} else {
  # 若不显著，也输出默认建议
  best_tau_age_norm_init <- median(norm_init$Age, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("\n---- 阈值检测总结 ----\n")
  cat("显著性水平 α =", alpha_level, "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("Age 阈值效应: p = %s (不显著)\n", formatC(pval_age, format = "f", digits = 4)))
  cat(sprintf("推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = %.4f\n", best_tau_age_norm_init))
}
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## ---- 阈值检测总结 ----
## 显著性水平 α = 0.1 
## 
## Age 阈值效应: p = 0.0254 (显著)
## 推荐 To-SNR 初始化阈值 (基于 AIC 网格搜索) = 43.8687
cat("\n================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age）===============\n")
## 
## ================ To-SNR 单阈值模型（Age）===============
tryCatch({
  # ---- 初始化 ----
  tau_init <- c(Age = 31)
  
  # ---- 全局变量 ----
  Y <- norm_init$GDM
  X <- norm_init$Age
  Z_vars <- c("ghb", "ghb_phi", "Ethnicity", "IVF", "Parity", "BMI", "HB", "MCH", "MCV", "FF")
  Z <- norm_init[, Z_vars, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 保证 Z 原子列
  Z <- as.data.frame(lapply(Z, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
  }))
  
  # ---- 调用 To-SNR 优化 ----
  tau_est <- ToSNR_logistic_1dim(tau_init)
  tau_age <- tau_est$tau
  best_tau_age_norm_init <- tau_age
  
  # ---- 在 To-SNR 优化后构造 Age_phi ----
  norm_init$Age_phi <- as.numeric(norm_init$Age > tau_age) * (norm_init$Age - tau_age)
  
  # ---- 拟合最终 GLM ----
  glm_data <- data.frame(Y = Y, Age = X, Age_phi = norm_init$Age_phi, Z)
  glm_final_norm_init <- glm(Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
  print(summary(glm_final_norm_init))
  
  # ---- AUC 评估 ----
  pred_joint <- predict(glm_final_norm_init, type = "response")
  auc_tosnr <- pROC::auc(Y, pred_joint)
  cat(sprintf("\nTo-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = %.4f\n", auc_tosnr))
  
  # ---- 输出阈值表 ----
  tau_df_norm_Age_init <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(tau_age),
    Threshold = tau_age
  )
  print(tau_df_norm_Age_init)
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("❌ To-SNR 模型（Age）出错：", e$message, "\n")
})
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Y ~ ., family = "binomial", data = glm_data, control = list(maxit = 25))
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept) -4.6021265  2.1181733  -2.173   0.0298 *  
## Age          0.1090612  0.0210158   5.189 2.11e-07 ***
## Age_phi     -0.0775253  0.0347121  -2.233   0.0255 *  
## ghb         -0.8259080  0.3915272  -2.109   0.0349 *  
## ghb_phi      2.1725061  0.4698503   4.624 3.77e-06 ***
## Ethnicity1  -0.0042965  0.1868311  -0.023   0.9817    
## IVF1        -0.0849388  0.2894299  -0.293   0.7692    
## Parity1     -0.2180618  0.0947801  -2.301   0.0214 *  
## BMI1        -0.3307216  0.1418956  -2.331   0.0198 *  
## BMI3         0.2831759  0.1441156   1.965   0.0494 *  
## BMI4         0.3837539  0.2182191   1.759   0.0787 .  
## HB           0.0322984  0.0052940   6.101 1.05e-09 ***
## MCH         -0.1168120  0.0550067  -2.124   0.0337 *  
## MCV          0.0360766  0.0212326   1.699   0.0893 .  
## FF           0.0002828  0.0012932   0.219   0.8269    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 3402.3  on 2960  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 3188.0  on 2946  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 3218
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
## 
## To-SNR 模型（Age）联合 AUC = 0.6723
##     Variable Threshold
## Age      Age  31.18239
# =================== 阈值检测（Age2，使用norm_init数据） ===================

# 初始模型公式（包含 ghb_phi）
initial_formula <- "GDM ~ Age + Ethnicity + IVF + Parity + BMI + HB + MCH + MCV + FF + ghb + ghb_phi + Age_phi"

# ---- 基础模型拟合 ----
base_model <- glm(as.formula(initial_formula), family = binomial, data = norm_init)

st_age <- score_test_for_threshold(
  var_vec = norm_init$Age,
  Y = norm_init$GDM,
  fitted_model = base_model,
  M = 10
)
pval_age <- st_age$p.value
cat("Age 阈值效应 p-value =", signif(pval_age, 4), "\n")
## Age 阈值效应 p-value = 0.7358
#################################
### Step10:阈值是否相等的检验 ###
#################################

### norm数据集 ###

# 1. 提取系数
beta_hat_norm_ghb_init <- coef(glm_final_norm_init)
beta_11_hat_norm_ghb_init <- beta_hat_norm_ghb_init["ghb_phi"]

# 2. 提取阈值（确保是单个数值）
tau_value_norm_ghb_init <- as.numeric(tau_df_norm_ghb_init$Threshold[1])

# 3. 预测概率
mu_hat_norm_init <- predict(glm_final_norm_init, type = "response")
mu_hat_norm_init <- pmin(pmax(mu_hat_norm_init, 1e-8), 1 - 1e-8)  # 避免极值

# 4. 计算期望
indicator_norm_ghb_init <- as.numeric(norm_init$ghb > tau_value_norm_ghb_init)
expectation_norm_ghb_init <- mean(
  beta_11_hat_norm_ghb_init^2 * indicator_norm_ghb_init * mu_hat_norm_init * (1 - mu_hat_norm_init),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# 5. 方差
var_tau_hat_norm_ghb_init <- 1 / expectation_norm_ghb_init / nrow(norm_init)

cat("Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0):", var_tau_hat_norm_ghb_init, "\n")
## Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0): 0.0004238533
### tha数据集 ###

# 1. 提取系数
beta_hat_tha_ghb_init <- coef(glm_final_tha_init)
beta_11_hat_tha_ghb_init <- beta_hat_tha_ghb_init["ghb_phi"]

# 2. 提取阈值（确保是单个数值）
tau_value_tha_ghb_init <- as.numeric(tau_df_tha_ghb_trun_init$Threshold[1])

# 3. 预测概率
mu_hat_tha_init <- predict(glm_final_tha_init, type = "response")
mu_hat_tha_init <- pmin(pmax(mu_hat_tha_init, 1e-8), 1 - 1e-8)  # 避免极值

# 4. 计算期望
indicator_tha_ghb_init <- as.numeric(tha_cleaned_trun$ghb > tau_value_tha_ghb_init)
expectation_tha_ghb_init <- mean(
  beta_11_hat_tha_ghb_init^2 * indicator_tha_ghb_init * mu_hat_tha_init * (1 - mu_hat_tha_init),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# 5. 方差
var_tau_hat_tha_ghb_init <- 1 / expectation_tha_ghb_init / nrow(tha_cleaned_trun)

cat("Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0):", var_tau_hat_tha_ghb_init, "\n")
## Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0): 0.003082667
### 假设二者独立的假设检验 ###
se_diff_ghb <- sqrt(var_tau_hat_norm_ghb_init + var_tau_hat_tha_ghb_init)
Z <- (tau_df_norm_ghb_init$Threshold - tau_df_tha_ghb_trun_init$Threshold) / se_diff_ghb
pval_ghb <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(Z)))
cat("Z =", Z, "p =", pval_ghb, "\n")
## Z = -5.748341 p = 9.012345e-09
#################################
### Step10:阈值是否相等的检验 ###
#################################

### norm数据集 ###

# 1. 提取系数
beta_hat_norm_Age_init <- coef(glm_final_norm_init)
beta_11_hat_norm_Age_init <- beta_hat_norm_Age_init["Age_phi"]

# 2. 提取阈值（确保是单个数值）
tau_value_norm_Age_init <- as.numeric(tau_df_norm_Age_init$Threshold[1])

# 3. 预测概率
mu_hat_norm_init <- predict(glm_final_norm_init, type = "response")
mu_hat_norm_init <- pmin(pmax(mu_hat_norm_init, 1e-8), 1 - 1e-8)  # 避免极值

# 4. 计算期望
indicator_norm_Age_init <- as.numeric(norm_init$Age > tau_value_norm_Age_init)
expectation_norm_Age_init <- mean(
  beta_11_hat_norm_Age_init^2 * indicator_norm_Age_init * mu_hat_norm_init * (1 - mu_hat_norm_init),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# 5. 方差
var_tau_hat_norm_Age_init <- 1 / expectation_norm_Age_init / nrow(norm_init)

cat("Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0):", var_tau_hat_norm_Age_init, "\n")
## Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0): 0.7439833
### tha数据集 ###

# 1. 提取系数
beta_hat_tha_Age_init <- coef(glm_final_tha_init)
beta_11_hat_tha_Age_init <- beta_hat_tha_Age_init["Age_phi"]

# 2. 提取阈值（确保是单个数值）
tau_value_tha_Age_init <- as.numeric(tau_df_tha_Age_trun_init$Threshold[1])

# 3. 预测概率
mu_hat_tha_init <- predict(glm_final_tha_init, type = "response")
mu_hat_tha_init <- pmin(pmax(mu_hat_tha_init, 1e-8), 1 - 1e-8)  # 避免极值

# 4. 计算期望
indicator_tha_Age_init <- as.numeric(tha_cleaned_trun$Age > tau_value_tha_Age_init)
expectation_tha_Age_init <- mean(
  beta_11_hat_tha_Age_init^2 * indicator_tha_Age_init * mu_hat_tha_init * (1 - mu_hat_tha_init),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# 5. 方差
var_tau_hat_tha_Age_init <- 1 / expectation_tha_Age_init / nrow(tha_cleaned_trun)

cat("Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0):", var_tau_hat_tha_Age_init, "\n")
## Estimated asymptotic variance of sqrt(n)*(tau_hat - tau_0): 0.9992198
### 假设二者独立的假设检验 ###
se_diff_Age <- sqrt(var_tau_hat_norm_Age_init + var_tau_hat_tha_Age_init)
Z <- (tau_df_norm_Age_init$Threshold - tau_df_tha_Age_trun_init$Threshold) / se_diff_Age
pval_Age <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(Z)))
cat("Z =", Z, "p =", pval_Age, "\n")
## Z = -2.277898 p = 0.02273265
###################################
### Step11:变量层级可迁移性探索 ###
###################################

delta_score_test_refined <- function(X_target, y_target, X_source, y_source, w_hat, intercept_w) {
  n0 <- nrow(X_target)
  nk <- nrow(X_source)
  n_total <- n0 + nk
  p <- ncol(X_target)
  
  # 1. 目标域计算 (与之前一致)
  eta_null <- as.vector(X_target %*% w_hat + intercept_w)
  prob_null <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_null))
  res_t <- y_target - prob_null
  w_t <- prob_null * (1 - prob_null)
  
  # 目标域 Hessian (J_n)
  J_n <- t(X_target) %*% (diag(w_t) %*% X_target) / n0
  
  # 2. 计算 Var(w_hat) 的贡献
  # 估计 J_pool 用于计算 w_hat 的不确定性
  X_pool <- rbind(X_target, X_source)
  # 假设在 H0 下 w_hat 对全样本有效
  eta_pool <- as.vector(X_pool %*% w_hat + intercept_w)
  prob_pool <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_pool))
  w_p <- prob_pool * (1 - prob_pool)
  J_pool_inv <- solve(t(X_pool) %*% (diag(w_p) %*% X_pool) / n_total + 1e-8 * diag(p))
  
  # Var_w_hat 尺度为 1/n_total
  Var_w_hat <- J_pool_inv / n_total
  
  pvals <- numeric(p)
  
  # 3. 逐变量计算补偿后的 Score Test
  # 修正后的方差: V_j = Var_target(U_j) - Projection_Correction
  # 这里的推导基于: U_j 依赖于 hat{w}, 而 hat{w} 又是数据的函数
  for (j in 1:p) {
    U_j <- sum(X_target[, j] * res_t)
    
    # --- 关键修正部分 ---
    # 基础目标域方差 (n0 尺度)
    V_target <- n0 * J_n[j, j] 
    
    # 补偿项：考虑 w_hat 波动对 U_j 的影响
    # dUj/dw = n0 * J_n[j, ]
    grad_j <- n0 * J_n[j, ]
    V_compensation <- as.numeric(grad_j %*% Var_w_hat %*% grad_j)
    
    # 最终方差估计 (注意：由于 hat{w} 是使总 score 为 0 的点，
    # 在目标域 score 上的方差实际上会因为这种“适应”而减小)
    # 正确的方差形式应考虑两者相关的 Sandwich 结构
    V_total <- V_target - V_compensation 
    
    # 确保方差为正
    V_total <- max(V_total, 1e-8)
    
    S_j <- (U_j^2) / V_total
    pvals[j] <- 1 - pchisq(S_j, df = 1)
  }
  
  names(pvals) <- colnames(X_target)
  return(pvals)
}

loglik_logistic <- function(y, X, beta, intercept = 0) {
  eta <- as.vector(X %*% beta + intercept)
  sum(y * eta - log(1 + exp(eta)))
}

LRT_delta_vector_1 <- function(
    X_target, y_target,
    X_source, y_source,
    result
) {
  
  ## ======================
  ## 提取 A-Trans 结果
  ## ======================
  w_hat     <- as.numeric(result$w_hat)
  delta_hat <- as.numeric(result$delta_hat)
  
  int_w    <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_w)
  int_beta <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_beta)
  
  p <- length(delta_hat)
  
  ## ======================
  ## Unconstrained model
  ## ======================
  ## source：单独 glm
  fit_s <- glm(y_source ~ X_source, family = binomial())
  coef_s <- coef(fit_s)
  
  intercept_s_hat <- coef_s[1]
  beta_s_hat <- as.numeric(coef_s[-1])
  
  ll_U <-
    loglik_logistic(
      y_target, X_target,
      w_hat + delta_hat,
      int_beta
    ) +
    loglik_logistic(
      y_source, X_source,
      beta_s_hat,
      intercept = intercept_s_hat
    )
  
  ## ======================
  ## Constrained model (H0: delta = 0)
  ## source & target 都用 w_hat
  ## ======================
  ll_C <-
    loglik_logistic(
      y_target, X_target,
      w_hat,
      int_w
    ) +
    loglik_logistic(
      y_source, X_source,
      w_hat,
      int_w
    )
  
  ## ======================
  ## LRT
  ## ======================
  LRT <- 2 * (ll_U - ll_C)
  pval <- 1 - pchisq(max(0, LRT), df = p)
  
  return(list(
    LRT = LRT,
    df = p,
    p_value = pval
  ))
}

LRT_delta_vector_2 <- function(
    X_target, y_target,
    X_source, y_source,
    result
) {
  
  w_hat     <- as.numeric(result$w_hat)
  delta_hat <- as.numeric(result$delta_hat)
  int_w     <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_w)
  int_beta  <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_beta)
  
  p <- length(delta_hat)
  
  ## Only target likelihood matters
  ll_U <- loglik_logistic(
    y_target, X_target,
    w_hat + delta_hat,
    int_beta
  )
  
  ll_C <- loglik_logistic(
    y_target, X_target,
    w_hat,
    int_w
  )
  
  LRT <- 2 * (ll_U - ll_C)
  pval <- 1 - pchisq(max(0, LRT), df = p)
  
  return(list(LRT = LRT, df = p, p_value = pval))
}
###################################
### Step11:变量层级可迁移性探索 ###
###################################

result1 <- A_Trans_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  A = NULL,            # transferring set, 若设为 NULL 则默认使用所有源域
  lambda_w = 0,     # transferring step 的 L1 正则参数
  lambda_s = 0,     # debiasing step 的 L1 正则参数
  max_iter = 1000,
  tol = 1e-6
)

result1_CI_C <- C_Trans_CI_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  result1,            # 必须：Algorithm1 的输出（包含 result_trans$beta_hat）
  alpha = 0.05
)

result1_CI_D <- D_Trans_CI_logistic(
  X_target_2, y_target_2,
  X_source_2, y_source_2,
  result1,
  alpha = 0.05
)

delta_score_test_refined(X_target_2, y_target_2, X_source_2, y_source_2, result1$w_hat, result1$intercepts$intercept_w)
##        ghb    ghb_phi        Age    Age_phi         HB        MCH        MCV 
## 0.84451117 0.07215895 0.34989386 0.07127897 0.11949413 0.64805841 0.53594666 
##         FF Ethnicity1       IVF1    Parity1       BMI2       BMI3       BMI4 
## 0.08207757 0.02950950 0.20189927 0.60153266 0.05935851 0.09248133 0.90545006
lrt_res_1 <- LRT_delta_vector_1(
  X_target = X_target_2,
  y_target = y_target_2,
  X_source = X_source_2,
  y_source = y_source_2,
  result   = result1
)
lrt_res_1
## $LRT
## [1] 26.16499
## 
## $df
## [1] 14
## 
## $p_value
## [1] 0.02466428
lrt_res_2 <- LRT_delta_vector_2(
  X_target = X_target_2,
  y_target = y_target_2,
  X_source = X_source_2,
  y_source = y_source_2,
  result   = result1
)
lrt_res_2
## $LRT
## [1] 20.42313
## 
## $df
## [1] 14
## 
## $p_value
## [1] 0.1173556
use_C_vars <- c("Ethnicity1", "BMI2")

trans_CI_df_1 <-
  result1_CI_D$ci_table %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    result1_CI_C$ci_table,
    by = "Variable",
    suffix = c("_D", "_C")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    CI_lower_Trans = ifelse(
      Variable %in% use_C_vars,
      CI_lower_C,
      CI_lower_D
    ),
    CI_upper_Trans = ifelse(
      Variable %in% use_C_vars,
      CI_upper_C,
      CI_upper_D
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Variable,
    CI_lower_Trans,
    CI_upper_Trans
  )
###################################
### Step11:变量层级可迁移性探索 ###
###################################

final_SE_df_1 <-
  result1_CI_D$ci_table %>%
  dplyr::select(Variable, SE_final = SE) %>%
  dplyr::rows_update(
    result1_CI_C$ci_table %>%
      dplyr::filter(Variable %in% c("Ethnicity1", "BMI2")) %>%
      dplyr::select(Variable, SE_final = SE),
    by = "Variable"
  )

# 从 result2_CI_C 中获取 Variable 列表和顺序作为参考
variable_names <- result1_CI_C$ci_table$Variable

# 提取并合并所有 Estimate 值
intercept_estimate <- as.numeric(result1$intercepts$intercept_beta)
covariate_estimate <- as.numeric(result1$beta_hat)

if (length(covariate_estimate) != (length(variable_names) - 1)) {
  stop("result$beta_hat 的长度与变量数量不匹配。")
}

# 构造完整的 Estimate 数据框
final_estimate_df_1 <- data.frame(
  Variable = variable_names,
  Estimate = c(
    intercept_estimate,
    covariate_estimate
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 3. 合并最终的 Estimate 和最终选择的 SE
final_results_trans_1 <- final_estimate_df_1 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(final_SE_df_1, by = "Variable")
final_results_trans_1$z_value <- with(final_results_trans_1, Estimate / SE_final)
final_results_trans_1$p_value <- with(final_results_trans_1, 2 * pnorm(abs(z_value), lower.tail = FALSE))

# 4. 构造命名向量，用于 calc_curve_with_ci
coef_trans_1 <- setNames(final_results_trans_1$Estimate, final_results_trans_1$Variable)
se_trans_1 <- setNames(final_results_trans_1$SE_final, final_results_trans_1$Variable)
###################################
### Step11:变量层级可迁移性探索 ###
###################################

for (key_var in names(key_vars_list)) {
  
  # 在循环内部定义所有必要的局部变量：
  tau <- key_vars_list[[key_var]]$tau
  x_seq <- key_vars_list[[key_var]]$seq
  phi_var <- paste0(key_var, "_phi")
  
  message(paste("Calculating curves for GLM:", key_var))
  
  # --- GLM 计算 ---
  df_glm <- calc_curve_with_ci(
    x_seq = x_seq, tau = tau, key_var = key_var,
    beta_g = coef_est[key_var],
    beta_phi = coef_est[phi_var],
    se_g = se_est[key_var],
    se_phi = se_est[phi_var],
    coef_all = coef_est,
    se_all_full = se_est, # GLM SE
    X_ref = X_target_2, # 假设 GLM 和 Trans 使用相同的参考数据进行曲线绘制
    model_label = "GLM"
  )
  
  # --- A-Trans 计算 ---
  message(paste("Calculating curves for A-Trans:", key_var))
  
  df_trans <- calc_curve_with_ci(
    x_seq = x_seq, tau = tau, key_var = key_var,
    beta_g = coef_trans_1[key_var],
    beta_phi = coef_trans_1[phi_var],
    se_g = se_trans_1[key_var],
    se_phi = se_trans_1[phi_var],
    coef_all = coef_trans_1,
    se_all_full = se_trans_1, # Trans SE
    X_ref = X_target_2, 
    model_label = "A-Trans"
  )
  
  # 合并 GLM 和 Trans 结果
  all_df[[key_var]] <- rbind(df_glm, df_trans)
}
## Calculating curves for GLM: ghb
## Calculating curves for A-Trans: ghb
## Calculating curves for GLM: Age
## Calculating curves for A-Trans: Age
# 合并所有计算结果，用于绘图
combined_plot_data_1 <- do.call(rbind, all_df)
###################################
### Step11:变量层级可迁移性探索 ###
###################################

combined_plot_data_1 <- combined_plot_data_1 %>%
  # 1. 合并标准化参数查找表
  left_join(scaling_df, by = "key_var") %>%
  
  # 2. 计算 x_var_original
  mutate(
    # X_original = X_scaled * sigma + mu
    x_var_original = x_var * sigma_val + mu_val
  ) %>%
  
  # 3. 移除用于计算的临时列
  dplyr::select(-mu_val, -sigma_val)

# 1. ghb 图
ghb_params <- get_params("ghb", tha_scaled_trun)
tau_ghb_original <- key_vars_list$ghb$tau * ghb_params$sigma + ghb_params$mu

ghb_plots <- plot_curve_all(combined_plot_data_1, tau_ghb_original, "ghb", "ghb (Original Scale)")

grid.arrange(ghb_plots$p1, ghb_plots$p2, ncol = 2, 
             top = "ghb Threshold Effect: Logit and Predicted Probability")

# 2. Age 图
age_params <- get_params("Age", tha_scaled_trun)
tau_age_original <- key_vars_list$Age$tau * age_params$sigma + age_params$mu

age_plots <- plot_curve_all(combined_plot_data_1, tau_age_original, "Age", "Age (Original Scale)")

grid.arrange(age_plots$p1, age_plots$p2, ncol = 2, 
             top = "Age Threshold Effect: Logit and Predicted Probability")

###################################
### Step11:变量层级可迁移性探索 ###
###################################

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 4: 评估 A-Trans/阈值 GLM 模型 (基于 coef_trans)
# ----------------------------------------------------

# 获取 A-Trans 模型所需的协变量名称和顺序（这些名称应包含阈值项的名称）
coef_names_trans_1 <- names(coef_trans_1)

# 重新排列/选择 X 矩阵的列，使其与 coef_trans 的名称顺序严格一致
X_trans_matched_1 <- X_target_2_intercept[, coef_names_trans_1, drop = FALSE]

prob_trans_1 <- predict_glm_prob(X_trans_matched_1, coef_trans_1)
k_trans_1 <- length(coef_trans_1)
eval_trans_1 <- evaluate_model(prob_trans_1, y_target_2, k_trans_1)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# 步骤 5: 生成对比表格
# ----------------------------------------------------

comparison_table_1 <- data.frame(
  Model = c("GLM (coef_est)", "A-Trans(coef_trans)"),
  AIC = c(eval_est$AIC, eval_trans_1$AIC),
  AUC = c(eval_est$AUC, eval_trans_1$AUC),
  Num_Parameters = c(k_est, k_trans_1)
) %>%
  mutate(
    AIC = round(AIC, 3),
    AUC = round(AUC, 3)
  )

print("--- 模型评估对比表 ---")
## [1] "--- 模型评估对比表 ---"
print(comparison_table_1)
##                 Model    AIC   AUC Num_Parameters
## 1      GLM (coef_est) 573.53 0.705             15
## 2 A-Trans(coef_trans) 573.53 0.705             15
###################################
### Step12:LRT/SCORE simulation ###
###################################

loglik_logistic <- function(y, X, beta, intercept = 0) {
  eta <- as.vector(X %*% beta + intercept)
  # 数值稳定版防止 exp 溢出
  sum(y * eta - log(1 + exp(eta)))
}

generate_X <- function(n, p, type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal")) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  
  if (type == "indep") {
    X <- matrix(rnorm(n * p), n, p)
    
  } else if (type == "corr") {
    Sigma <- 0.5 ^ abs(outer(1:p, 1:p, "-"))
    X <- MASS::mvrnorm(n, mu = rep(0, p), Sigma = Sigma)
    
  } else if (type == "nonnormal") {
    X <- matrix(NA, n, p)
    X[, 1:2] <- matrix(rt(n * 2, df = 3), n, 2)   # heavy-tail
    X[, 3:4] <- matrix(rexp(n * 2) - 1, n, 2)     # skewed
    X[, 5]   <- rnorm(n)
  }
  
  colnames(X) <- paste0("X", 1:p)
  X
}

generate_delta <- function(type = c("null", "local", "alt")) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  
  if (type == "null") {
    rep(0, 5)
  } else if (type == "local") {
    c(0, 0, 0.05, 0.05, 0)
  } else {
    c(0.5, 0.5, 0, 0, 0)
  }
}

generate_X_threshold <- function(n, p = 5, type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal"), tau_true = 0) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  
  if (type == "indep") {
    Z <- matrix(rnorm(n * p), n, p)
  } else if (type == "corr") {
    Sigma <- 0.5 ^ abs(outer(1:p, 1:p, "-"))
    Z <- MASS::mvrnorm(n, mu = rep(0, p), Sigma = Sigma)
  } else if (type == "nonnormal") {
    Z <- matrix(NA, n, p)
    Z[, 1:2] <- matrix(rt(n * 2, df = 3), n, 2)   # heavy-tail
    Z[, 3:4] <- matrix(rexp(n * 2) - 1, n, 2)     # skewed
    Z[, 5]   <- rnorm(n)
  }
  
  # 强制将 X2 修改为基于 X1 的变点项: (X1 - tau)_+
  X <- Z
  X[, 2] <- pmax(X[, 1] - tau_true, 0)
  colnames(X) <- paste0("X", 1:p)
  return(X)
}

generate_delta_threshold <- function(type = c("null", "local", "alt")) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  if (type == "null") {
    rep(0, 5)
  } else if (type == "local") {
    c(0, 0, 0.01, 0.01, 0)
  } else {
    c(0.5, 0.5, 0, 0, 0) 
  }
}
###################################
### Step12:LRT/SCORE simulation ###
###################################

# ----------------------------------------------------
# LRT_joint的多种simulation实验
# ----------------------------------------------------

# ================================================================
# 1. 逻辑：利用目标域 + 源域的似然变化进行 H0: delta = 0 的联合检验
# ================================================================
LRT_delta_vector_1 <- function(X_target, y_target, X_source, y_source, result) {
  w_hat     <- as.numeric(result$w_hat)
  delta_hat <- as.numeric(result$delta_hat)
  int_w     <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_w)
  int_beta  <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_beta)
  p <- length(delta_hat)
  
  ## Unconstrained model: source 独立 MLE
  # 抑制 glm 的数值警告，避免干扰流程
  fit_s <- suppressWarnings(glm(y_source ~ X_source, family = binomial()))
  coef_s <- coef(fit_s)
  int_s_hat <- coef_s[1]
  beta_s_hat <- as.numeric(coef_s[-1])
  
  ll_U <- loglik_logistic(y_target, X_target, w_hat + delta_hat, int_beta) +
          loglik_logistic(y_source, X_source, beta_s_hat, int_s_hat)
  
  ## Constrained model: 两域共用 w_hat
  ll_C <- loglik_logistic(y_target, X_target, w_hat, int_w) +
          loglik_logistic(y_source, X_source, w_hat, int_w)
  
  LRT <- 2 * (ll_U - ll_C)
  pval <- 1 - pchisq(max(0, LRT), df = p)
  
  return(list(LRT = LRT, df = p, p_value = pval))
}

# ================================================================
# 2. 单次模拟函数 (one_rep_sim_LRT_joint)
# ================================================================
one_rep_sim_LRT_joint <- function(X_type, delta_type, n_t = 500, n_s = 3000, p = 5) {
  tryCatch({
    # --- 1. 增加明确的 tau_true 参数 ---
    tau_true   <- 0.5
    w_true     <- rep(0.5, p)
    delta_true <- generate_delta_threshold(delta_type)
    beta_t     <- w_true + delta_true
    
    # --- 2. 参数对齐：传入 type 和 tau_true ---
    X_t <- generate_X_threshold(n_t, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    X_s <- generate_X_threshold(n_s, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    
    # --- 3. 【最核心修改】：加入截距项 -1，防止概率全为 1 导致的 GLM 崩溃 ---
    y_t <- rbinom(n_t, 1, plogis(X_t %*% beta_t - 1))
    y_s <- rbinom(n_s, 1, plogis(X_s %*% w_true - 1))
    
    # 估计 A-Trans
    res <- suppressWarnings(
      A_Trans_logistic(X_target = X_t, y_target = y_t, X_source = X_s, y_source = y_s,
                       lambda_w = 1e-4, lambda_s = 1e-4)
    )
    
    # 联合检验
    test <- LRT_delta_vector_1(X_t, y_t, X_s, y_s, result = res)
    return(test$p_value)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error:", e$message, "\n")
    return(NA_real_)
  })
}

# ================================================================
# 3. 模拟主控函数 (run_simulation_LRT_joint)
# ================================================================
run_simulation_LRT_joint <- function(MC = 500, X_type, delta_type) {
  # 显式使用 as.numeric 确保返回向量
  pvals <- as.numeric(replicate(MC, one_rep_sim_LRT_joint(X_type, delta_type)))
  
  valid_pvals <- pvals[!is.na(pvals)]
  n_valid <- length(valid_pvals)
  
  if(n_valid == 0) return(c(0, 0, 0)) # 兜底防止除以0
  
  return(c(
    mean_pval   = mean(valid_pvals),
    reject_rate = mean(valid_pvals < 0.05),
    valid_rate  = n_valid / MC
  ))
}

# ================================================================
# 4. 执行并生成最终表
# ================================================================
settings <- expand.grid(
  X_type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal"),
  delta_type = c("null", "local", "alt"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

sim_results_LRT_joint <- settings %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    res = list(run_simulation_LRT_joint(MC = 500, X_type = X_type, delta_type = delta_type))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    mean_pval   = res[1],  # 修正：直接按索引取
    reject_rate = res[2],
    valid_rate  = res[3]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-res) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

print(sim_results_LRT_joint)
## # A tibble: 9 × 5
##   X_type    delta_type mean_pval reject_rate valid_rate
##   <chr>     <chr>          <dbl>       <dbl>      <dbl>
## 1 indep     null        0.404          0.1            1
## 2 corr      null        0.391          0.102          1
## 3 nonnormal null        0.412          0.064          1
## 4 indep     local       0.417          0.092          1
## 5 corr      local       0.369          0.116          1
## 6 nonnormal local       0.411          0.098          1
## 7 indep     alt         0.00122        0.994          1
## 8 corr      alt         0.00275        0.99           1
## 9 nonnormal alt         0.000112       1              1
###################################
### Step12:LRT/SCORE simulation ###
###################################

# ----------------------------------------------------
# LRT_target的多种simulation实验
# ----------------------------------------------------
# ================================================================
# 1. 逻辑：仅利用目标域的似然变化进行 H0: delta = 0 的联合检验
# ================================================================
LRT_delta_vector_2 <- function(X_target, y_target, X_source, y_source, result) {
  # 显式转换确保类型正确
  w_hat     <- as.numeric(result$w_hat)
  delta_hat <- as.numeric(result$delta_hat)
  int_w     <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_w)
  int_beta  <- as.numeric(result$intercepts$intercept_beta)
  p <- length(delta_hat)
  
  # 无约束似然 (Full Model): 使用 beta_hat = w_hat + delta_hat
  ll_U <- loglik_logistic(y_target, X_target, w_hat + delta_hat, int_beta)
  
  # 约束似然 (Null Model): H0: delta = 0, 仅使用 w_hat
  ll_C <- loglik_logistic(y_target, X_target, w_hat, int_w)
  
  # 似然比统计量 (由于 lambda 控制，确保其非负)
  LRT <- 2 * (ll_U - ll_C)
  pval <- 1 - pchisq(max(0, LRT), df = p)
  
  return(list(LRT = LRT, df = p, p_value = pval))
}

# ================================================================
# 2. 单次模拟函数：one_rep_sim_LRT_target
# ================================================================
one_rep_sim_LRT_target <- function(X_type, delta_type, n_t = 500, n_s = 3000, p = 5) {
  tryCatch({
    # 真参数设置 (增加 tau_true)
    tau_true   <- 0.5
    w_true     <- rep(0.5, p)
    delta_true <- generate_delta_threshold(delta_type)
    beta_t     <- w_true + delta_true
    
    # 数据生成 (加入 tau_true 参数)
    X_t <- generate_X_threshold(n_t, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    X_s <- generate_X_threshold(n_s, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    
    # 关键修改：加入截距 -1，防止完全分离
    y_t <- rbinom(n_t, 1, plogis(X_t %*% beta_t - 1))
    y_s <- rbinom(n_s, 1, plogis(X_s %*% w_true - 1))
    
    res <- suppressWarnings(
      A_Trans_logistic(X_target = X_t, y_target = y_t, X_source = X_s, y_source = y_s,
                       lambda_w = 1e-4, lambda_s = 1e-4)
    )
    
    test <- LRT_delta_vector_2(X_t, y_t, X_s, y_s, result = res)
    return(test$p_value)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(NA_real_)
  })
}

# ================================================================
# 3. 模拟主控函数：run_simulation_LRT_target
# ================================================================
run_simulation_LRT_target <- function(MC = 500, X_type, delta_type) {
  # 迭代运行并向量化结果
  pvals <- as.numeric(replicate(MC, one_rep_sim_LRT_target(X_type, delta_type)))
  
  # 过滤异常值
  valid_pvals <- pvals[!is.na(pvals)]
  n_valid <- length(valid_pvals)
  
  # 杜绝 reject_rate = NA 的最后防线
  if (n_valid == 0) return(c(mean_pval = NA, reject_rate = NA, valid_rate = 0))
  
  return(c(
    mean_pval   = mean(valid_pvals),
    reject_rate = mean(valid_pvals < 0.05),
    valid_rate  = n_valid / MC
  ))
}

# ================================================================
# 4. 多场景仿真实验
# ================================================================
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)

# 定义配置矩阵
settings <- expand.grid(
  X_type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal"),
  delta_type = c("null", "local", "alt"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 执行 Pipeline 并格式化输出
sim_results_LRT_target <- settings %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # 运行仿真并存储为 list
    res = list(run_simulation_LRT_target(MC = 500, X_type = X_type, delta_type = delta_type))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # 统一按索引提取数值，避免类型不匹配导致的 NA
    mean_pval   = res[1],
    reject_rate = res[2],
    valid_rate  = res[3]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-res) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# 打印结果预览
print(sim_results_LRT_target)
## # A tibble: 9 × 5
##   X_type    delta_type mean_pval reject_rate valid_rate
##   <chr>     <chr>          <dbl>       <dbl>      <dbl>
## 1 indep     null        0.470          0.042          1
## 2 corr      null        0.471          0.046          1
## 3 nonnormal null        0.476          0.046          1
## 4 indep     local       0.469          0.056          1
## 5 corr      local       0.472          0.038          1
## 6 nonnormal local       0.477          0.056          1
## 7 indep     alt         0.00331        0.986          1
## 8 corr      alt         0.00497        0.978          1
## 9 nonnormal alt         0.000625       0.998          1
###################################
### Step12:LRT/SCORE simulation ###
###################################

# ----------------------------------------------------
# SCORE_single的多种simulation实验
# ----------------------------------------------------
one_rep_sim_Score_refined <- function(
    X_type, delta_type,
    n_t = 500, n_s = 3000, p = 5
) {
  tryCatch({
    # --- 1. 生成参数 --- (增加 tau_true)
    tau_true   <- 0.5
    w_true     <- rep(0.5, p)
    delta_true <- generate_delta_threshold(delta_type)
    beta_t     <- w_true + delta_true
    
    # --- 2. 生成数据 --- (加入 tau_true 参数)
    X_t <- generate_X_threshold(n_t, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    X_s <- generate_X_threshold(n_s, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    
    # 关键修改：加入截距 -1
    y_t <- rbinom(n_t, 1, plogis(X_t %*% beta_t - 1))
    y_s <- rbinom(n_s, 1, plogis(X_s %*% w_true - 1))
    
    # --- 3. 迁移估计 (A-Trans) ---
    res <- suppressWarnings(
      A_Trans_logistic(
        X_target = X_t, y_target = y_t,
        X_source = X_s, y_source = y_s,
        lambda_w = 1e-4,
        lambda_s = 1e-4
      )
    )
    
    # --- 4. 逐变量 Score Test ---
    p_vals <- delta_score_test_refined(
      X_target = X_t, y_target = y_t,
      X_source = X_s, y_source = y_s,
      w_hat = res$w_hat,
      intercept_w = res$intercepts$intercept_w
    )
    
    return(p_vals)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(rep(NA_real_, p))
  })
}

run_simulation_Score_refined <- function(MC = 500, X_type, delta_type) {
  # 运行模拟，得到 p x MC 矩阵
  pvals_mat <- replicate(MC, one_rep_sim_Score_refined(X_type, delta_type))
  
  # 转置为 MC x p
  pvals_mat <- t(pvals_mat)
  
  # 1. 计算每个变量的拒绝率 (Size/Power)
  # 结果为 c(V1 = rate1, V2 = rate2, ...)
  reject_rates <- colMeans(pvals_mat < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  names(reject_rates) <- paste0("Rej_X", 1:length(reject_rates))
  
  # 2. 计算有效模拟比例
  valid_rate <- sum(complete.cases(pvals_mat)) / MC
  
  # 合并结果为一个扁平向量返回
  return(c(reject_rates, valid_rate = valid_rate))
}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'tidyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:Matrix':
## 
##     expand, pack, unpack
library(MASS)

# 确保单次重复函数 one_rep_sim_Score_refined 已定义（同方案三）

# 1. 定义实验配置
settings <- expand.grid(
  X_type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal"),
  delta_type = c("null", "local", "alt"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 2. 执行实验并展开变量表现
sim_results_Score_refined <- settings %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # 得到的结果是一个包含 V1~Vp 拒绝率的向量
    sim_stats = list(run_simulation_Score_refined(
      MC = 500,
      X_type = X_type,
      delta_type = delta_type
    ))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  # 核心修改：将向量中的 V1, V2, ..., valid_rate 展开为独立的列
  tidyr::unnest_wider(sim_stats)

# 3. 输出展示
# 这样您可以直接看到每个变量在不同数据类型和假设下的具体拒绝率
print(sim_results_Score_refined)
## # A tibble: 9 × 8
##   X_type    delta_type Rej_X1 Rej_X2 Rej_X3 Rej_X4 Rej_X5 valid_rate
##   <chr>     <chr>       <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl>      <dbl>
## 1 indep     null        0.034  0.064  0.048  0.066  0.042          1
## 2 corr      null        0.058  0.054  0.064  0.05   0.036          1
## 3 nonnormal null        0.06   0.056  0.056  0.046  0.056          1
## 4 indep     local       0.048  0.048  0.064  0.048  0.046          1
## 5 corr      local       0.048  0.054  0.056  0.06   0.048          1
## 6 nonnormal local       0.052  0.05   0.06   0.036  0.056          1
## 7 indep     alt         1      0.996  0.078  0.086  0.086          1
## 8 corr      alt         1      0.988  0.04   0.076  0.11           1
## 9 nonnormal alt         1      1      0.104  0.104  0.09           1
#######################################
### Step13:Translearning simulation ###
#######################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(pbapply)
library(parallel)

# ================================================================
# 1. 带变点效应的丰富数据生成器 (DGP)
# ================================================================
generate_X_threshold <- function(n, p = 5, type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal"), tau_true = 0) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  
  if (type == "indep") {
    Z <- matrix(rnorm(n * p), n, p)
  } else if (type == "corr") {
    Sigma <- 0.5 ^ abs(outer(1:p, 1:p, "-"))
    Z <- MASS::mvrnorm(n, mu = rep(0, p), Sigma = Sigma)
  } else if (type == "nonnormal") {
    Z <- matrix(NA, n, p)
    Z[, 1:2] <- matrix(rt(n * 2, df = 3), n, 2)   # heavy-tail
    Z[, 3:4] <- matrix(rexp(n * 2) - 1, n, 2)     # skewed
    Z[, 5]   <- rnorm(n)
  }
  
  # 强制将 X2 修改为基于 X1 的变点项: (X1 - tau)_+
  X <- Z
  X[, 2] <- pmax(X[, 1] - tau_true, 0)
  colnames(X) <- paste0("X", 1:p)
  return(X)
}

generate_delta_threshold <- function(type = c("null", "local", "alt")) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  if (type == "null") {
    rep(0, 5)
  } else if (type == "local") {
    c(0, 0, 0.01, 0.01, 0)
  } else {
    c(0.5, 0.5, 0, 0, 0) 
  }
}

# ================================================================
# 2. 单次模拟函数 (增加了 GLM 提取的容错保护)
# ================================================================
one_rep_sim_Estimation_threshold <- function(X_type, delta_type, n_t = 300, n_s = 3000, p = 5) {
  tryCatch({
    # --- 1. 生成真实参数 ---
    tau_true   <- 0.5           
    w_true     <- rep(0.5, p)   
    delta_true <- generate_delta_threshold(delta_type)
    beta_true  <- w_true + delta_true 
    int_true   <- -1            
    
    # --- 2. 生成带变点的复杂数据 ---
    X_t <- generate_X_threshold(n_t, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    X_s <- generate_X_threshold(n_s, p, type = X_type, tau_true = tau_true)
    
    y_t <- rbinom(n_t, 1, plogis(X_t %*% beta_true + int_true))
    y_s <- rbinom(n_s, 1, plogis(X_s %*% w_true + int_true))
    
    # --- 3. 基线模型：目标域独立拟合 GLM ---
    df_t <- data.frame(Y = y_t, X_t)
    fit_glm <- suppressWarnings(glm(Y ~ ., family = binomial(), data = df_t))
    
    # 【修复部分】安全提取系数和标准误，防止秩亏或完全分离导致的崩溃
    coef_glm <- coef(fit_glm)[-1] # 长度必为 p，不收敛的变量会是 NA
    se_glm <- rep(NA, p)
    names(se_glm) <- paste0("X", 1:p)
    
    sum_coef <- summary(fit_glm)$coefficients
    # 只提取成功计算出标准误的变量
    valid_vars <- intersect(names(se_glm), rownames(sum_coef))
    if (length(valid_vars) > 0) {
      se_glm[valid_vars] <- sum_coef[valid_vars, "Std. Error"]
    }
    
    ci_low_glm <- coef_glm - 1.96 * as.numeric(se_glm)
    ci_up_glm  <- coef_glm + 1.96 * as.numeric(se_glm)
    
    # --- 4. 迁移学习模型 (完全调用你的 A_Trans_logistic) ---
    res_trans <- suppressWarnings(
      A_Trans_logistic(X_target = X_t, y_target = y_t, 
                       X_source = X_s, y_source = y_s,
                       lambda_w = 1e-4, lambda_s = 1e-3)
    )
    
    res_CI_C <- C_Trans_CI_logistic(X_t, y_t, X_s, y_s, res_trans, alpha = 0.05)
    res_CI_D <- D_Trans_CI_logistic(X_t, y_t, X_s, y_s, res_trans, alpha = 0.05)
    
    delta_hat <- as.numeric(res_trans$delta_hat)
    ci_low_trans <- numeric(p)
    ci_up_trans  <- numeric(p)
    
    for(j in 1:p) {
      if(abs(delta_hat[j]) < 1e-6) {
        ci_low_trans[j] <- res_CI_C$ci_table$CI_lower[j+1] 
        ci_up_trans[j]  <- res_CI_C$ci_table$CI_upper[j+1]
      } else {
        ci_low_trans[j] <- res_CI_D$ci_table$CI_lower[j+1]
        ci_up_trans[j]  <- res_CI_D$ci_table$CI_upper[j+1]
      }
    }
    coef_trans <- as.numeric(res_trans$beta_hat)
    
    # --- 5. 组装结果 ---
    res_df <- data.frame(
      Variable = paste0("X", 1:p),
      Beta_True = beta_true,
      Beta_GLM = as.numeric(coef_glm),
      CI_Low_GLM = as.numeric(ci_low_glm),
      CI_Up_GLM = as.numeric(ci_up_glm),
      Beta_Trans = coef_trans,
      CI_Low_Trans = ci_low_trans,
      CI_Up_Trans = ci_up_trans,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    return(res_df)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    # 如果还是崩溃，打印出来让我们知道原因
    message("Simulation failed: ", e$message)
    return(NULL) 
  })
}

# ================================================================
# 3. 模拟主控函数 (带进度条版)
# ================================================================
run_simulation_Estimation <- function(MC = 200, X_type, delta_type, n_t) {
  
  cat(sprintf("\n🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[%s] | 异质性=[%s] | 目标样本量=[%d]\n", 
              X_type, delta_type, n_t))
  
  n_cores <- max(1, detectCores() - 1) 
  
  results_list <- pblapply(1:MC, function(i) {
    one_rep_sim_Estimation_threshold(X_type = X_type, delta_type = delta_type, n_t = n_t, n_s = 3000, p = 5)
  }, cl = n_cores)
  
  results_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), results_list)
  if(length(results_list) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  all_res <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
  
  summary_res <- all_res %>%
    group_by(Variable) %>%
    summarise(
      # 补回 Bias 的计算，且不加绝对值以保证 MSE = Bias^2 + Variance 严格成立
      Bias_GLM = mean(Beta_GLM - Beta_True, na.rm=TRUE),
      Bias_Trans = mean(Beta_Trans - Beta_True, na.rm=TRUE),
      
      MSE_GLM = mean((Beta_GLM - Beta_True)^2, na.rm=TRUE),
      MSE_Trans = mean((Beta_Trans - Beta_True)^2, na.rm=TRUE),
      CP_GLM = mean(Beta_True >= CI_Low_GLM & Beta_True <= CI_Up_GLM, na.rm=TRUE),
      CP_Trans = mean(Beta_True >= CI_Low_Trans & Beta_True <= CI_Up_Trans, na.rm=TRUE),
      Width_GLM = mean(CI_Up_GLM - CI_Low_GLM, na.rm=TRUE),
      Width_Trans = mean(CI_Up_Trans - CI_Low_Trans, na.rm=TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  return(summary_res)
}

# ================================================================
# 4. 执行实验 (耗时操作)
# ================================================================
set.seed(2026) 

# 为了演示时间，这里仅选取 null 和 alt 两种异质性，以及 3 个样本量梯度
est_settings <- expand.grid(
  X_type = c("indep", "corr", "nonnormal"),
  delta_type = c("null", "local", "alt"),
  n_t = c(200, 500, 1000), 
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat("开始运行变点迁移学习性能模拟 (可能需要几分钟)...\n")
## 开始运行变点迁移学习性能模拟 (可能需要几分钟)...
sim_results_Estimation <- est_settings %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sim_data = list(run_simulation_Estimation(MC = 200, X_type = X_type, delta_type = delta_type, n_t = n_t))
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(sim_data) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[200]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[500]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[null] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[local] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[indep] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[corr] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[1000]
## 
## 🚀 正在运行场景: 分布=[nonnormal] | 异质性=[alt] | 目标样本量=[1000]
# ================================================================
# 5. 结果可视化 (针对核心变点特征 X2)
# ================================================================
# 提取 X2 (阈值截断项) 的数据进行可视化
plot_data_X2 <- sim_results_Estimation %>%
  filter(Variable == "X2") %>%
  # 转换为长格式以方便 ggplot 绘图
  pivot_longer(cols = c(MSE_GLM, MSE_Trans, CP_GLM, CP_Trans), 
               names_to = c("Metric", "Method"), 
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = c("GLM", "Trans")))

# 5.1 绘制 MSE 趋势图 (优化版)
p_mse <- plot_data_X2 %>%
  filter(Metric == "MSE") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_t, y = Value, color = Method, group = Method)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_grid(delta_type ~ X_type, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
  labs(title = "Empirical MSE of Threshold Effect (X2)",
       subtitle = "Rows: Heterogeneity (delta_type) | Cols: Data Distribution (X_type)",
       x = "Target Sample Size (n_t)", y = "Mean Squared Error (MSE)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"), # 🌟 增加各个小图之间的间距
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9) # 调整字体大小
  )

# 5.2 绘制 CP (覆盖率) 趋势图 (优化版)
p_cp <- plot_data_X2 %>%
  filter(Metric == "CP") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_t, y = Value, color = Method, group = Method)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") + 
  facet_grid(delta_type ~ X_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("GLM" = "#FF7F0E", "Trans" = "#17BECF")) +
  # 🌟 关键修改：将 breaks 改成 0.1，减少 Y 轴刻度数量，防止数字重叠
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.7, 1.0), breaks = seq(0.7, 1.0, 0.1)) +
  labs(title = "Coverage Probability (CP) of Threshold Effect (X2)",
       subtitle = "Dashed red line indicates 95% nominal level",
       x = "Target Sample Size (n_t)", y = "Coverage Probability") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"), # 🌟 增加间距
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9) 
  )

# 打印图像
grid.arrange(p_mse, p_cp, ncol = 1)

# ================================================================
# 5.3 进阶可视化：偏差-方差权衡 (Bias-Variance Trade-off)
# ================================================================
# 根据公式: MSE = Bias^2 + Variance -> Variance = MSE - Bias^2
# 我们提取 X2 变量，计算平方偏差 (Bias_sq) 和方差 (Variance)
plot_data_tradeoff <- sim_results_Estimation %>%
  filter(Variable == "X2") %>%
  mutate(
    Bias_sq_GLM = Bias_GLM^2,
    Variance_GLM = MSE_GLM - Bias_sq_GLM,
    Bias_sq_Trans = Bias_Trans^2,
    Variance_Trans = MSE_Trans - Bias_sq_Trans
  ) %>%
  # 整理成长格式，准备画堆叠条形图
  dplyr::select(n_t, delta_type, X_type, 
         Bias_sq_GLM, Variance_GLM, Bias_sq_Trans, Variance_Trans) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Bias_sq_GLM, Variance_GLM, Bias_sq_Trans, Variance_Trans),
               names_to = c("Component", "Method"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)_(.*)",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(
    Method = factor(Method, levels = c("GLM", "Trans")),
    # 确保 Variance 在堆叠图的下方，Bias_sq 在上方
    Component = factor(Component, levels = c("Variance", "Bias_sq")) 
  )

# 绘制偏差-方差分解堆叠柱状图
p_tradeoff <- ggplot(plot_data_tradeoff, aes(x = factor(n_t), y = Value, fill = Component)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(delta_type ~ X_type + Method, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Variance" = "#A0C4FF", "Bias_sq" = "#FFADAD"),
                    labels = c("Variance", "Bias squared")) +
  labs(title = "Bias-Variance Decomposition of MSE (Variable X2)",
       subtitle = "Trans uses a slight increase in Bias to massively reduce Variance",
       x = "Target Sample Size (n_t)",
       y = "Mean Squared Error (Decomposed)",
       fill = "Component") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", 
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# 打印图片
print(p_tradeoff)

# 输出表格摘要
cat("\n=== X2 (变点项) 在 nonnormal 分布下的详细数据表 ===\n")
## 
## === X2 (变点项) 在 nonnormal 分布下的详细数据表 ===
print(sim_results_Estimation %>% 
        filter(Variable == "X2" & X_type == "nonnormal") %>%
        dplyr::select(n_t, delta_type, MSE_GLM, MSE_Trans, CP_GLM, CP_Trans, Width_GLM, Width_Trans), 
      digits = 3)
## # A tibble: 9 × 8
##     n_t delta_type MSE_GLM MSE_Trans CP_GLM CP_Trans Width_GLM Width_Trans
##   <dbl> <chr>        <dbl>     <dbl>  <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>       <dbl>
## 1   200 null        0.302     0.245   0.965    0.95      1.98        1.76 
## 2   200 local       0.291     0.233   0.95     0.965     2.00        1.77 
## 3   200 alt         0.896     0.641   0.965    0.955     3.20        2.84 
## 4   500 null        0.0948    0.0698  0.935    0.95      1.19        1.07 
## 5   500 local       0.112     0.0841  0.94     0.945     1.19        1.04 
## 6   500 alt         0.250     0.206   0.945    0.935     1.91        1.77 
## 7  1000 null        0.0445    0.0302  0.965    0.975     0.838       0.742
## 8  1000 local       0.0502    0.0363  0.925    0.935     0.830       0.721
## 9  1000 alt         0.0984    0.0870  0.985    0.97      1.32        1.24
